## Team Allek here!
Good evening everyone, we here at Team Allek would like to wish you & your loved ones a Merry Christmas. If you haven’t yet, please sign a petition, sign up to volunteer, or donate to our campaign today!
Buenas noches a todos, aquí en el Equipo Allek nos gustaría desearles a ustedes y a sus queridos una Feliz Navidad. Si aún no lo ha hecho, firme una petición, regístrese para ser voluntario o haga una donación a nuestra campaña hoy.
[_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/voteallek_](https://837e3.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsE8LUNF3whHnk96VOKhQy/C9R6Ej5-CH_R)

| [ DONATE TODAY](https://837e3.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsF30um5qet88GGlH2IAr6/QccjxwJpcPf7)
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | We have a long road ahead and we need your **SUPPORT!** Stand with Allek, plant your feet firmly on the ground, and shout **NO MORE!** Allek **WILL** fight every day to make sure the economy grows stronger, your rights are protected, and no one is left behind! Contribute to the fight for our future today! If everyone on this list would please support us by donating, we would surpass our August goal! And if you can make it a reoccurring monthly donation, consider it a "**Subscription to Democracy!** " I hope you can help us reach our critical goal before tonight's midnight deadline.
---

| | | **I'm running for Congressional District 7 and would love your help!**

If everyone on this list would please support us by printing, signing, and mailing your petition over, we would easily qualify for 2024! And the goal is to make Congressman Mills a 1 term Congressman!

subject: not a creature was stirring…except for the union members!
body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75760207/445673869/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjMyNjE1Mi1iYmEyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=89b8smuYHC2o650lR6qHBYvrr2lTQ11A4UB78rgAd-k=&emci=0df341fe-889e-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=1f326152-bba2-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=6787172) It’s the night before Christmas, folks. And whether you’re spending tomorrow celebrating with family or ordering in and watching movies, **you likely have unions to thank for your time off.** In fact, you can thank unions for your days off, workplace safety laws, and the fact that you legally have to get paid in real money — seriously, look it up! 2023 has been full of workers across multiple industries demanding fair pay, better working conditions, and much more. That momentum will only continue in the new year. And in case you didn’t already know, _**young Americans have overwhelmingly stood with labor.**_ With 64% approval, Gen Z is the most pro-union generation alive today, with Millennials not far behind at 60% approval. We’ve stood on the front lines of the labor movement, but we need your help to keep the fight going. [A world where all workers have what they need to thrive is in our grasp. Will you add your name to our petition to help us fight for workers’ rights in 2024 and beyond?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75760208/445673872/-2080107085?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjMyNjE1Mi1iYmEyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=89b8smuYHC2o650lR6qHBYvrr2lTQ11A4UB78rgAd-k=&emci=0df341fe-889e-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=1f326152-bba2-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=6787172)

name: LCV
subject: Happy Holidays from LCV!
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/qjPNc8bz-

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_s3axqZJ-

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10364785&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg4MDI2NDA1OAS2&spReportId=MTg4MDI2NDA1OAS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10364785&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg4MDI2NDA1OAS2&spReportId=MTg4MDI2NDA1OAS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_ ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTd~LX2cG/eWRabEp2MTVvY2RPOEVmTU1wQjdSQWJ5NmQ5aklaNDM0eFFDU3NHOGs2c2NHR3dYRGJ3cGVoRHhsUnBaMGRrSnV3VzQ2OG9RNFo4UW9hTnpNWVNXOGw3NG9Pc3ZIZmxnZ3Ywck5vTk42aEE9S0/

name: Trump News HQ
subject: REVEALED: What school book fairs are teaching children
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4qq130bfcsul5qrk193pkul2po9058iup8n3490_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgvcdo23jtg2aoei0lpkn8mn02q855kal7fb9h1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs)[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkcjov9s1bj13qerdfuqh34sbonemiisvgh5se10_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbtbob0lrc607n6oqg8mjng3brtisanoo7irriqg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs)

[Donate](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6sm2soee2o40c2am1gei4gu7kpbjs5j03f9fm58_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4a2hbsfrgbk632d1ara82r3mk9l3ued13r4kkl0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6oodetqtr2mpqt9fet27eo6nljt96j3jv8lcdbg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbhtcog9j50nfi9b1gvo11tu0fps5kdukt3eka9o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zosbe4obvelsc52p53an2g3ev631rrupuhtab8a8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqh47d2bvienckp3dr1a3o7o7cd8v9c6n4fi7j4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb9pmqi17ece08bn48tarcq6pr28nhbnntr0rln8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3kpcu9mjg0rncqtr1btepf1kf4nnus7fbsvm4bg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf85hev7trduaq3ft0c4v1j7on55jk372c38e1bg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs)

Let's bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It's not complicated! It's what you and I grew up with.

Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic!

God bless,

Kirk Cameron

P.S. Scholastic's monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation.

I've partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic.

[Help us raise $100,000 to fund book fairs this spring semester at schools. Click here to donate >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zloenlj59ehmbpopqs4ob70bbbkcj79vt18ccf5g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs)

A reminder of what we're up against:

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgguksiuv20vmohqe4bm96ejdgc1b10enr9ccvs8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs)

It's time to fight back.

You and I cannot afford to do nothing and let the woke mob indoctrinate millions of children.

[Click here to donate and help SkyTree change the world.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zepb7vhcsq70uufhj32t07fbs0123j37gslpfpjg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36c5ie1ob6c5h2bs)

name: A New Direction
subject: Warm Wishes for a Merry Christmas from A New Direction
body:
The spirit of unity, faith, and freedom
[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtlyudk-dihkkhuuli-r/) Friend, As the holiday season is upon us, we wanted to take a moment to extend our heartfelt wishes for a Merry Christmas filled with joy, warmth, and cherished moments with loved ones.This year has been a testament to the strength and resilience of our great nation, and as we gather with family and friends to celebrate the birth of Christ, let us also reflect on the values that make our country exceptional. At A New Direction, we are grateful for the opportunity to serve our community and uphold the principles that have defined our great state for generations. This Christmas, may the spirit of unity, faith, and freedom bring comfort and happiness to you and your loved ones.As we look forward to the coming year, let us continue to work together to build a future that honors the traditions and values that make Oregon strong.Wishing you a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year!Warm regards,A New Direction [](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtlyudk-dihkkhuuli-y/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtlyudk-dihkkhuuli-j/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtlyudk-dihkkhuuli-t/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtlyudk-dihkkhuuli-i/) | [Preferences](https://andor.updatemyprofile.com/y-xtlyudk-172B6299-dihkkhuuli-d) | [Unsubscribe](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-u-xtlyudk-dihkkhuuli-h/)

name: Your America
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37205%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wkn0YMgSGO0vxcw%2ftQbV%2fQ&sysid=1) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That’s why I’m asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37206%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ym%2fxjZQjEE0wwrjwKs75og&sysid=1)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today’s ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America’s great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America’s leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we’ve seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37206%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ym%2fxjZQjEE0wwrjwKs75og&sysid=1)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Your America News

clean_body: The survey will only take a few moments of your time This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That’s why I’m asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today’s ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America’s great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America’s leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we’ve seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: American Defense News
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlph3i0u5od1u0p34s8i6ppn31ldtoo2ni42lsb0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg64o33cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbji00rdq8mpvq399dc6eqn46s34vmqg8acke1oo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg64o33cph2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zoairqm2rdqklrd8kfku5bp9k5dblfncobg2aaco_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg64o33cph2bs) [NO](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi3da0g05a9ces63t9dmfr4d3esv9b19d8lbqggg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg64o33cph2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbvdatasvd3schfsqpi82653gaq7nnf9l4rt9sqo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg64o33cph2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: American Briefing
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent...

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd0aj4m64a05d34ka68bcm6se6k02d1mqbr8pgio_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg64o35cth2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo7grv3pbbg2ssejabmtv3irg4jjhosvqqvprs28_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg64o35cth2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zimt6ln0tu620k9r5l27n9j0eio10ud0bjto0lv0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg64o35cth2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

---

name: GOP Presidential
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeke55d0cf2uv0n3fjrg69p83s4ss7l7svau4sl0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg64o35cth2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... name: 1600 Daily
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent...

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3i44lf77pci2sp91gg600co99o1psirtqgj89b8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg64o33c1h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9kgspvm28ue1tjm2uj73do19deuuk8sl636cq5g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg64o33c1h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs94q2ea7s0319j3fi3pp6o6o6b37e86jti77ato_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg64o33c1h2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Your America
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37203%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Yx2C3dEJ52KNbvIoEee2cQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37204%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qScHJ%2bAywh6lKAAZWZ1IWw&sysid=1)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37215%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dx3yWD8ISrkdX94Yc56Hmg&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37216%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7nSnA0logfVLiboSilqz6w&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37204%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qScHJ%2bAywh6lKAAZWZ1IWw&sysid=1)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: How you can defeat radical leftism
body:
...the fight isn’t lost.

&#F847;
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688972%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y4YUi1%2beUUnZwShaLHlnVQ&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,

Insane leftist policies threaten to destroy our country. Leftist policies cause open borders, rampant corruption, rising crime, and the erasing of American freedom. And the corporate media refuses to cover these failures and instead push their own leftist narratives. Americans are fed up with the lack of action to fix these problems and save our crumbling republic.

But the fight isn’t lost.

The Heritage Foundation has developed four key initiatives to defeat the leftist agenda and tackle these critical issues head on.

**Through Project 2025 we’ve devised a plan to dismantle the deep state** by training thousands of patriotic Americans to staff the next presidential administration, enact conservative policy solutions, and replace the deep state’s leftist bureaucrats.

**We’re taking on government corruption through the Heritage Oversight Project**. Our expert team of lawyers and investigators are in the trenches, filing lawsuits and Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the D.C. swamp’s wrongdoings and hold perpetrators accountable.

**We’re working to end Biden’s open borders** by developing key public policy solutions that will secure America’s borders. Just this year, The Heritage Foundation’s research was pivotal to the House-passed Secure the Border Act.

And through our **Election Integrity Scorecard** , we’re holding state policymakers accountable by ranking the security and integrity of each state’s election laws and procedures. Governors and state policymakers contact our team frequently looking for ways to improve their score.

All of these projects will defeat leftist policies and bring about success for our country next year. But I need your support to get them over the finish line.

**Please give a tax-deductible gift today to help support this comprehensive plan to save America using the secure link below:

[https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688973%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BMZVLtrO7h3%2f2bERlM%2bNcw&sysid=1)**

Your generous support will ensure these initiatives achieve great wins for our country as we enter 2024.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

# **[Nasty fight breaks out between college football players after losing player sucker punches winning player during postgame celebrations](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
An ugly scene unfolded in Mobile on Saturday night after an Eastern Michigan player appeared to sucker punch a South Alabama player following South Alabama's 59-10 victory in the 68 Ventures Bowl, sparking off an ugly on-field brawl. South Alabama, which was playing on their home field, cruised to an easy victory in the game. They led 38-3 at halftime and were in command virtually from the opening kickoff. They outgained Eastern Michigan 627 yards to 150 in the game.

name: ICYMI News
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent...

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8n9tb337701j4da03ramg9ofv7subpbt24q9rl8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg6aor2c5h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z04eguaa3bqt03o6l0k6sqpvouhar230usf8hvmg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg6aor2c5h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkg7f66fdt846p0cti2rg1c5rpcj2nf3gefte3s8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg6aor2c5h2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: An opportunity to save our nation
body:
...the fight isn’t lost.

&#F847;
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp2bhc0ifcam9b4bmk9hm6vmuvrq67hc9gfamnag_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg6aor2c3h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,

Insane leftist policies threaten to destroy our country. Leftist policies cause open borders, rampant corruption, rising crime, and the erasing of American freedom. And the corporate media refuses to cover these failures and instead push their own leftist narratives. Americans are fed up with the lack of action to fix these problems and save our crumbling republic.

But the fight isn’t lost.

The Heritage Foundation has developed four key initiatives to defeat the leftist agenda and tackle these critical issues head on.

**Through Project 2025 we’ve devised a plan to dismantle the deep state** by training thousands of patriotic Americans to staff the next presidential administration, enact conservative policy solutions, and replace the deep state’s leftist bureaucrats.

**We’re taking on government corruption through the Heritage Oversight Project**. Our expert team of lawyers and investigators are in the trenches, filing lawsuits and Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the D.C. swamp’s wrongdoings and hold perpetrators accountable.

**We’re working to end Biden’s open borders** by developing key public policy solutions that will secure America’s borders. Just this year, The Heritage Foundation’s research was pivotal to the House-passed Secure the Border Act.

And through our **Election Integrity Scorecard** , we’re holding state policymakers accountable by ranking the security and integrity of each state’s election laws and procedures. Governors and state policymakers contact our team frequently looking for ways to improve their score.

All of these projects will defeat leftist policies and bring about success for our country next year. But I need your support to get them over the finish line.

**Please give a tax-deductible gift today to help support this comprehensive plan to save America using the secure link below:

[https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi3cqupi2slnbq343r0d5h6hndamo8v07q221eco_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg6aor2c3h2bs)**

Your generous support will ensure these initiatives achieve great wins for our country as we enter 2024.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

### Merry Christmas!
For this Christmas, I want to share with you my submission for the U.S. House of Representatives _Chaplain's Advent book_ :
---
## Hon. Brandon Williams (NY-22)
### Isaiah 53:3
_He was despised and rejected by men; a man of sorrows, and acquainted with grief; and as one from whom men hide their faces; he was despised, and we esteemed him not._
---
| | |
---|---|---
Jesus didn’t have to suffer. He Could have chosen never to be inconvenienced, insulted, or hungry. He could easily defeat His enemies. Yet, he chose to suffer--not just everyday ailments, but to endure unspeakable torture and humiliation. Since Jesus allowed Himself to suffer, suffering must have significance. Suffering is the defining quality of the human experience. Jesus committed Himself to share in the brokenness of our human experience, as Isaiah prophesied 600 years in advance. Consider this: suffering equips us to understand other people’s suffering and to help them bear their burdens. Suffering plants the seeds of humility--but also bitterness, we must choose--which is the most essential quality of a good life. We are blessed so that we may be a blessing to others. But we suffer so that we can serve others in need. Jesus was the perfect example.
---
| | |
---|---|---
From my family to yours, we wish you a Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!
---
| | |
---|---|---

name: American Action News
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc6d0j6tsac7etsrup5jmk716dm7m8rp44ej3fp8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg64o37cdh2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8f34hn67d423grfoc6d240pukndg286bcc5v3do_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg64o37cdh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9apl9g32hgjn8u2qoqhmdipbme7k142r40jjmug_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg64o37cdh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: American Action News via. Hillsdale College
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfkq44qkqgq8ighpg1jdm5mtmtc51e5ner7hrql0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg69oj6chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq4dijibq9ofq9op1bio5qq2fvgg6resp9gcmbk8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg69oj6chh2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn580pts71qtfmjcf5aq09q9adsm58gql6sliu6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg69oj6chh2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5l2n9olsdes8k08nducvomc26i06792d59uqui0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg69oj6chh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsq3k40k711c3lvpksk8to7giabkkl7pc266bf4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg69oj6chh2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Action News

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn3eakcve2lt6tvcp0de1fijtb25d9ekf6hlspdo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg69oj6chh2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpbna6kr421o1nkfkujd3n5iek07f8p95i0keaeo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg69oj6chh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zed19i3e7ndlrk5fqrr7s5b58ev14f31s4cv2v30_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg69oj6chh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Trump Train News
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent...

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn7mubssckicp1ri84opd86aqd1tvc8g9rvt5fg8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg6aor6cph2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9m1s54nid9sh7novftau97mj9j9v70hfmpkqg00_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg6aor6cph2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zafscod8fq0lbpp92pa8ng2a54mcl1a2aj84qtfg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg6aor6cph2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbkbm9mobmu9030h8ifba40gpo4hrcqa7hhd8si0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg69oj6chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl1uu7eqno6adkjvgjm7oe5uovatbsqd6uhmah48_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg69oj6chh2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs29b50rlin19figaop3uqnpe0adq8alu95mdpn0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg69oj6chh2bs) [NO](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze9mloaoh0ohtdsjfiiqejqp8nrvev34r6r0u8cg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg69oj6chh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z33mkojv3f3ne2a09sok9ul20v5adtaok1ati5t0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36clg69oj6chh2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Coach
subject: 🎄Merry Christmas, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
| | | Peter, Before the day gets away from me, I just wanted to reach out and wish you a very Merry Christmas!
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/54762a5046a516133947229f28c3afba/9310bbfd03735e36c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
This morning, I’m reminded of Isaiah 9:6, which beautifully captures the spirit of Christmas:_“For to us a child is born, to us a son is given, and the government will be on his shoulders. And he will be called Wonderful Counselor, Mighty God, Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace.”_ Not only is this a day to celebrate the birth of Jesus Christ, but it’s also a special opportunity for us to come together with family and friends and reflect on the blessings in our lives. I hope you have a wonderful Christmas Day with your loved ones! Sincerely, Coach

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qc7TT--m2j-bDMKflWo3Dw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbAuKP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjEyMDEyM19STV9ST05fMjAyMzEyMjVXA3NwY0IKZYN2XolluDIbBFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qc7TT--m2j-bDMKflWo3Dw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbAuKP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjEyMDEyM19STV9ST05fMjAyMzEyMjVXA3NwY0IKZYN2XolluDIbBFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qc7TT--m2j-bDMKflWo3Dw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbAuKP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjEyMDEyM19STV9ST05fMjAyMzEyMjVXA3NwY0IKZYN2XolluDIbBFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: The Flyover
subject: Merry Christmas

# MONDAY, DECEMBER 25, 2023
---|---
**Merry Christmas**! We hope you're enjoying a day of feasting and rejoicing with your family. The Flyover team is taking some time off for the holiday, and we'll return with our next edition on Wednesday, 12/27. Have a wonderful Christmas!
| |

subject: MERRY CHRISTMAS!
