body:
Finstad for Congress

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDkyMjE2MTUS1&r=MTYyNDE1OTk1MzM1OAS2&j=MjYwMjUxMTQyNAS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
| | Friend - Merry Christmas!

I trust this Christmas Season has provided you and your loved ones with ample moments of rest, fellowship, and pure joy.
And I hope that as we celebrate the birth of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, you enjoy the peace that comes with knowing no matter what, He is in control.

I want to express my deep gratitude for all the support you've shown. However, in this moment, let's set aside the hustle and bustle of politics and campaigns. Instead, let's enjoy the Christmas season and time with our families.
Thank you, sincerely, for everything. Wishing you a truly wonderful Christmas.
God bless!

Brad Finstad

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: How you can defeat radical leftism
body:
...the fight isn't lost.

&#F847;
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=72545a62db324abe875f2783e6d4971f&_e=zJ93b8P5Hj_a4hUeS--5L86d21pDqKPHKqYdjzN2KxuxrNEJl0FU81cZxQw6KcKRWDM3TEWf-Xs4fhOt6zWbANP2-cJENfNjP4MYOUDzKvR9tn1OzZ05fJObYBXijV0OoMIuyIrWZjcleTLBXPrFa6VCrjCB_FLOstIpSCKhke82M8dyVdhJlMhV9nGjF7976CZH9Gin8Y8tlf6TXFqDQ6hgduS59qCrApQ7dF_Y1W328d5mBi51aSDrkDpTzy5dxoOUT7oxDt3kfp3avsFLRZT8DfmShL37OdPVB1UTDKgl3xFdUb4l1GkI8r75iCaXanksS8gZ1aJ01ZtHzndy8ySHeL0nITRoLuNGRcRkNT0%3D)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,

Insane leftist policies threaten to destroy our country. Leftist policies cause open borders, rampant corruption, rising crime, and the erasing of American freedom. And the corporate media refuses to cover these failures and instead push their own leftist narratives. Americans are fed up with the lack of action to fix these problems and save our crumbling republic.

But the fight isn't lost.

The Heritage Foundation has developed four key initiatives to defeat the leftist agenda and tackle these critical issues head on.

**Through Project 2025 we 've devised a plan to dismantle the deep state** by training thousands of patriotic Americans to staff the next presidential administration, enact conservative policy solutions, and replace the deep state's leftist bureaucrats.

**We 're taking on government corruption through the Heritage Oversight Project**. Our expert team of lawyers and investigators are in the trenches, filing lawsuits and Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the D.C. swamp's wrongdoings and hold perpetrators accountable.

**We 're working to end Biden's open borders** by developing key public policy solutions that will secure America's borders. Just this year, The Heritage Foundation's research was pivotal to the House-passed Secure the Border Act.

And through our **Election Integrity Scorecard** , we're holding state policymakers accountable by ranking the security and integrity of each state's election laws and procedures. Governors and state policymakers contact our team frequently looking for ways to improve their score.

All of these projects will defeat leftist policies and bring about success for our country next year. But I need your support to get them over the finish line.

**Please give a tax-deductible gift today to help support this comprehensive plan to save America using the secure link below:

[https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=72545a62db324abe875f2783e6d4971f&_e=zJ93b8P5Hj_a4hUeS--5L86d21pDqKPHKqYdjzN2KxuxrNEJl0FU81cZxQw6KcKRWDM3TEWf-Xs4fhOt6zWbANP2-cJENfNjP4MYOUDzKvR9tn1OzZ05fJObYBXijV0OoMIuyIrWZjcleTLBXPrFa6VCrjCB_FLOstIpSCKhke82M8dyVdhJlMhV9nGjF797PF7xGLL1HWFTXwmlNeJnHXuZk6pAa1H5FOsDlnDGdunIswy5ePqXPawAMUZFl99I5EX2XeLV86At_TNxj0N4M9OOSX4emhnSjvPG80abT1ZAio1_UIXcLyZa9Ww_tfaap2-F2QeEs2XLXxOqNHBu8NYAU5yPKAiE8gmy3hbwioA%3D)**

Your generous support will ensure these initiatives achieve great wins for our country as we enter 2024.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---

name: Full Mag News
subject: How should we elect the President?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2286726fc3794988b1139ed3835d8862&_e=4AjBgvceFNlSEuu-qnod39XMmZ9BCFYCvzAAgX0DnHZ7jys2oO1L-ttFsNtL94vi7LgPQ0skajox-S_gKLwf1Q3De4qJt_Vd3wKLjuKBo8LFzLIGWlu2ONCLcyoRWc8RZC1zN0QIuIbwrI-_vVwWY7yxhDYn9FokPMcDjf7gPUNNH2Q0_RPzQ5-Eo99OP0pVSLTxdrZXVPOGhaD6TrS8ZpeR2qfXNTlrQ878sJHQIcNt7UziOT0S3QCjvPMo7X9NKzq68qJwWDnaCfHCZzZFwQ1tk-wTIyTjcDQ5sSISjlC8GfaGgBHeD5j_VRrn34QklCiDQYMyNlI3f45Oan5uY9lawCGBxficbV6t0N6rvTx3XCYwFE4FZyfkkCYquU4sqZKpnb1VuUM5im-htPU3ndctz0i2VNw3DuALNKCOwyY%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2286726fc3794988b1139ed3835d8862&_e=4AjBgvceFNlSEuu-qnod39XMmZ9BCFYCvzAAgX0DnHZ7jys2oO1L-ttFsNtL94vi7LgPQ0skajox-S_gKLwf1Q3De4qJt_Vd3wKLjuKBo8LFzLIGWlu2ONCLcyoRWc8RZC1zN0QIuIbwrI-_vVwWY7yxhDYn9FokPMcDjf7gPUNNH2Q0_RPzQ5-Eo99OP0pVSLTxdrZXVPOGhaD6TrS8ZpeR2qfXNTlrQ878sJHQIcNt7UziOT0S3QCjvPMo7X9NabC2ySFdH2Y0MuFiH3FpMet3fD909u0DyMlY5HntyBrMosHI1tSsHJZx-bDRn4OZEnYNRAi2babZDbLFOV2z-0y5m7-NsUTpl2ovEbN_RN0Nj6ok0nOkd00PFmYRj4j3iGudtA0EI1ucf0-e-aABtE_TOrejpfkb-qSwH7rNpyo%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2286726fc3794988b1139ed3835d8862&_e=4AjBgvceFNlSEuu-qnod39XMmZ9BCFYCvzAAgX0DnHZ7jys2oO1L-ttFsNtL94vi7LgPQ0skajox-S_gKLwf1Q3De4qJt_Vd3wKLjuKBo8LFzLIGWlu2ONCLcyoRWc8RZC1zN0QIuIbwrI-_vVwWY7yxhDYn9FokPMcDjf7gPUNNH2Q0_RPzQ5-Eo99OP0pVSLTxdrZXVPOGhaD6TrS8ZpeR2qfXNTlrQ878sJHQIcNt7UziOT0S3QCjvPMo7X9NRqhMSE8dkE-oJN729XwiuCB3uXUtox_-mz-J5Pr_PjgYK33PnDu-M7eahFFhGKLlOpWjfz_1cXdBJ66017wX-WjPcr-vc51ihdBJJHKcqd6rWWcKXYqmu78I0UiBZZer1y5Wh-fVT6K70LeEtE0IAZsSvRRcnQLBcTq7IiLMqFE%3D) [NO](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2286726fc3794988b1139ed3835d8862&_e=4AjBgvceFNlSEuu-qnod39XMmZ9BCFYCvzAAgX0DnHZ7jys2oO1L-ttFsNtL94vi7LgPQ0skajox-S_gKLwf1Q3De4qJt_Vd3wKLjuKBo8LFzLIGWlu2ONCLcyoRWc8RZC1zN0QIuIbwrI-_vVwWY7yxhDYn9FokPMcDjf7gPUNNH2Q0_RPzQ5-Eo99OP0pVSLTxdrZXVPOGhaD6TrS8ZpeR2qfXNTlrQ878sJHQIcNt7UziOT0S3QCjvPMo7X9NVG76G2XN0D7I-MmxHEc9wHS8xXr5iSqxA1THam0epWolBDlnsx-0UJG3iQrOvXmDlWAKekSr86AWAn6nyhhVd3JjXgBAXD9ZG1BT3C-r6YmHtuvZabAnsQTK-_x3mbW5smk2Inrl4v5rxRtaOF0KbeAr71oy67DQJdDgKuZGLDw%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government? For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: How you can defeat radical leftism
body:
...the fight isn't lost.

&#F847;
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0839a752f44d49a29accab9a630d34e6&_e=9je5T-9t53g18dDv_lyKJ0uX0gu4eu54VtytPKDvy2175SaMC5MdboRK9_SQaEbjJRL7t8oQGNolopk2bS5F1MZjPUKl9WiieaOd7rBohDJYumh6DqUiHGUq5GnotKZkyVlTT9ZmwdAu8eZM3krQf7TNXUrdkNhVO6B12oRApNGk3Bj9MNEdqq2Rgcaf0VHtvP9iuX0lOFn1HVFXeSIdvmxuWN8uEQQZ9FQ7bRP8g910mZnTOGXraMJVA-Uob8RS1xZpIf5z3WRAsqUyhsRYA-nGykc5Lxiz7nfBw6ZeKv4eHqDiw6B2aUKsxBWqkNK3YG7w6VcHdDNmAn0o5YBtk3ozRxIKzv0YmGWPDF3znV0%3D)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,

Insane leftist policies threaten to destroy our country. Leftist policies cause open borders, rampant corruption, rising crime, and the erasing of American freedom. And the corporate media refuses to cover these failures and instead push their own leftist narratives. Americans are fed up with the lack of action to fix these problems and save our crumbling republic.

But the fight isn't lost.

The Heritage Foundation has developed four key initiatives to defeat the leftist agenda and tackle these critical issues head on.

**Through Project 2025 we 've devised a plan to dismantle the deep state** by training thousands of patriotic Americans to staff the next presidential administration, enact conservative policy solutions, and replace the deep state's leftist bureaucrats.

**We 're taking on government corruption through the Heritage Oversight Project**. Our expert team of lawyers and investigators are in the trenches, filing lawsuits and Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the D.C. swamp's wrongdoings and hold perpetrators accountable.

**We 're working to end Biden's open borders** by developing key public policy solutions that will secure America's borders. Just this year, The Heritage Foundation's research was pivotal to the House-passed Secure the Border Act.

And through our **Election Integrity Scorecard** , we're holding state policymakers accountable by ranking the security and integrity of each state's election laws and procedures. Governors and state policymakers contact our team frequently looking for ways to improve their score.

All of these projects will defeat leftist policies and bring about success for our country next year. But I need your support to get them over the finish line.

**Please give a tax-deductible gift today to help support this comprehensive plan to save America using the secure link below:

[https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0839a752f44d49a29accab9a630d34e6&_e=9je5T-9t53g18dDv_lyKJ0uX0gu4eu54VtytPKDvy2175SaMC5MdboRK9_SQaEbjJRL7t8oQGNolopk2bS5F1MZjPUKl9WiieaOd7rBohDJYumh6DqUiHGUq5GnotKZkyVlTT9ZmwdAu8eZM3krQf7TNXUrdkNhVO6B12oRApNGk3Bj9MNEdqq2Rgcaf0VHt0inSNTAlnIJqud5BM558fe3TJiOouHp2xYDMN15OeHRpiRhNCHGm9R89pm4KJ5YaB0etcyTd2KXwz2OkPBZAOIRTBizCg2UlpcAfW3iIKUU43z7Voyxet73KCJm1surFdlMQL_l8U_6Uqk4OwlRy5vM6kFRtYGPSoygRB3MXXbw%3D)**

Your generous support will ensure these initiatives achieve great wins for our country as we enter 2024.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

body:
Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9cdb1ce1f3b4eecbb8cb5f83c5a7e6c&_e=0D9pPVVK7vIkAxv4ZGcvPpE4fsVFNs9Nj9HT3jWMKzkv5y5Ex7MNdy9tE24MIcOGUjz6oMPZLwDnAm-kGfiUwiWZxXJ5SVoDglvSP4cPCcEnv5PvjgIWBRndFduVk77ae-iz8fHVzGYiSWnVUhWoG0HYg6jThY4CqsvSASu7PjSWmD_9Ey9DoevoxkLVd0dwEfvV6Oc2i_lqpatvTtCCsehhtisNwCVrn8LYzqPsACv6LB_BH6uTfNTek44_MRmn2ywd6VGPYIP6hJlrCPYhTz1RSF7d5UAg7vDcPBWgbmkbbesuYP7LflEAi88AlTKe_WRgcF9J8j2wBJZpi-xW8T0taanjXuLVsmVIISTspH8%3D)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,

The next presidential administration could be a turning point for our country.

After years of inflation, open borders, reckless spending, and rampant crime, America desperately needs effective governance grounded in our founding principles.

Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

That's because today, the deep state controls D.C.

**Regardless of who is in office, career bureaucrats in our federal agencies like the Justice Department, Environmental Protection Agency, and the State Department independently push their own leftist agendas.

** In order to implement common-sense, conservative policies, we must have a plan to rein in these agencies and replace these leftist bureaucrats with principled conservatives.

The Heritage Foundation has that plan--called Project 2025.

**Through Project 2025, The Heritage Foundation has united 80 conservative organizations and is leading the charge for the next presidential transition plan.**

Heritage's policy scholars created a comprehensive policy book and a plan to implement it starting day one of the next administration.

These policies include securing our borders, ensuring election integrity, and reversing the growth of regulations, spending, and inflation.

Additionally, we're identifying and training qualified patriots to staff the next administration and replace the leftist bureaucrats - ending their control of the deep state.

**The radical leftist mainstream media has published several panicked articles attacking Heritage and Project 2025.**

But as we like to say, if the leftist media is angry at you, you're over the target.

As 2024 rapidly approaches, we're kicking Project 2025 into high gear.

Will you help us make this much needed program a massive success? Will you support Project 2025 with a special gift today?
**
****If you 're ready to ensure the next presidential administration can enact conservative policies you and I believe in, please make a tax-deductible year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9cdb1ce1f3b4eecbb8cb5f83c5a7e6c&_e=0D9pPVVK7vIkAxv4ZGcvPpE4fsVFNs9Nj9HT3jWMKzkv5y5Ex7MNdy9tE24MIcOGUjz6oMPZLwDnAm-kGfiUwiWZxXJ5SVoDglvSP4cPCcEnv5PvjgIWBRndFduVk77ae-iz8fHVzGYiSWnVUhWoG0HYg6jThY4CqsvSASu7PjSWmD_9Ey9DoevoxkLVd0dwEfvV6Oc2i_lqpatvTtCCsa_P_hR-oPj3j5R3eSm8mzHXhYFGixG_hUroLgJqGD16Zbw4tpdYMa80xn07bLY1V7yYyl0JDF8T0uU1S7PyMm5sQecW146bJ7xVRviBurIbiQwxcsRWHaFPc3lKXGo4GckrrAh9t3truezEEPLUi6Y%3D)**

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Next year is a critical year and here at The Heritage Foundation, we 're ramping up our Project 2025 efforts to save America. name: Brian Schimming, Chairman
subject: Wishing you a very merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-xtrulll-didthutlhu-d/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtrulll-didthutlhu-r/)
### Friend,
### As we gather around our loved ones and celebrate the holidays, I want to take a moment to extend my warmest wishes to you and your family. Merry Christmas!
### Christmas is a time to cherish the moments spent with family, appreciating the warmth of togetherness and the spirit of giving. Whether it's the joy of exchanging gifts or the simple pleasure of sharing a festive meal, may your holiday season be filled with love, laughter, and memorable moments.
### As we approach the end of the year, I want to express my gratitude for your unwavering support of the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Your commitment to our shared values is the driving force behind our efforts to build a stronger, more prosperous Wisconsin.
### Looking ahead to the new year, I am filled with hope and excitement. May 2024 bring us victories and successes that will shape the future of our great state. With your continued support, we can work towards a Wisconsin that reflects our conservative principles and values.
### Thank you for being an essential part of our Republican efforts in Wisconsin. Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!
### Warm regards,
###
### Brian Schimming
Chairman, Republican Party of Wisconsin

clean_body: No images? Friend, As we gather around our loved ones and celebrate the holidays, I want to take a moment to extend my warmest wishes to you and your family. Merry Christmas! Christmas is a time to cherish the moments spent with family, appreciating the warmth of togetherness and the spirit of giving. Whether it's the joy of exchanging gifts or the simple pleasure of sharing a festive meal, may your holiday season be filled with love, laughter, and memorable moments. As we approach the end of the year, I want to express my gratitude for your unwavering support of the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Your commitment to our shared values is the driving force behind our efforts to build a stronger, more prosperous Wisconsin. Looking ahead to the new year, I am filled with hope and excitement. May 2024 bring us victories and successes that will shape the future of our great state. With your continued support, we can work towards a Wisconsin that reflects our conservative principles and values. Thank you for being an essential part of our Republican efforts in Wisconsin. Merry Christmas and Happy New Year! Warm regards, Brian Schimming Chairman, Republican Party of Wisconsin PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: How you can defeat radical leftism
body:
...the fight isn't lost.

&#F847;
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09ccd4af39d942aea6207177de248f40&_e=8r3k1i0FMsfAaxXswpioVBb8ZI8bWGm-lApWB1mYqIoP9x0RXpz5oZl7xGqI7GtnjIyVou60xPICb7o9S-athSm275usM310smN0AjzuOFsdVeWc-c5WTYwIJOA6SV86cRoDbA057rbl6O0XCjLXm9NLY2xe3T3m5G7ssDBGheXSFB6DpY_w1hACU9XIFruN6VvivpSU5z_5QbIYfUvtv2nyZgkwK5PlfqR8GUXsxPmP27WhQQ6fTRHaWjP7AwpuVhKKIguySdhHb3rDsV-0ndxsPKXe_WK8pZel4-hrfeHTT2yIHMv0MxdvZAv7Phe_PPPCODLFFNP2mY6Sw_12jiph-iKr693IhTLZVq4cD7c%3D)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,

Insane leftist policies threaten to destroy our country. Leftist policies cause open borders, rampant corruption, rising crime, and the erasing of American freedom. And the corporate media refuses to cover these failures and instead push their own leftist narratives. Americans are fed up with the lack of action to fix these problems and save our crumbling republic.

But the fight isn't lost.

The Heritage Foundation has developed four key initiatives to defeat the leftist agenda and tackle these critical issues head on.

**Through Project 2025 we 've devised a plan to dismantle the deep state** by training thousands of patriotic Americans to staff the next presidential administration, enact conservative policy solutions, and replace the deep state's leftist bureaucrats.

**We 're taking on government corruption through the Heritage Oversight Project**. Our expert team of lawyers and investigators are in the trenches, filing lawsuits and Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the D.C. swamp's wrongdoings and hold perpetrators accountable.

**We 're working to end Biden's open borders** by developing key public policy solutions that will secure America's borders. Just this year, The Heritage Foundation's research was pivotal to the House-passed Secure the Border Act.

And through our **Election Integrity Scorecard** , we're holding state policymakers accountable by ranking the security and integrity of each state's election laws and procedures. Governors and state policymakers contact our team frequently looking for ways to improve their score.

All of these projects will defeat leftist policies and bring about success for our country next year. But I need your support to get them over the finish line.

**Please give a tax-deductible gift today to help support this comprehensive plan to save America using the secure link below:

[https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09ccd4af39d942aea6207177de248f40&_e=8r3k1i0FMsfAaxXswpioVBb8ZI8bWGm-lApWB1mYqIoP9x0RXpz5oZl7xGqI7GtnjIyVou60xPICb7o9S-athSm275usM310smN0AjzuOFsdVeWc-c5WTYwIJOA6SV86cRoDbA057rbl6O0XCjLXm9NLY2xe3T3m5G7ssDBGheXSFB6DpY_w1hACU9XIFruNLV3creJSsMup4NV5p4jfb_DY7jvV3m0ebbyzMLkT5XHQr0z-52wi4p4gQ5lKHtRnWlArQdRoxIqFlzKTRPVFE-lVuAbUmPQp176wo04Ituk9wsvEYTgO89eA3JF5tT-vb7v-2VEF1DAMEAq-XogawZlMkiDYaYmbfFoN5FYMCOs%3D)**

Your generous support will ensure these initiatives achieve great wins for our country as we enter 2024.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

subject: Unlocking the Untold Traits of the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=71bf84373b414226b8669175d88ce1d7&_e=rMFgUKVrlgVcQ4C4K6-mVTrAd134H6PRRU7L-TvDuvLvqk7Sh8P9kNEnyhadMuTBa0SRQgIVatJuvPNZaP_p7qV-9rXdyaxVWe00CoaRvwYdHCU_1_DOzSqHUvG71zgtwH21rr9nu7UXl5ZXNNIf-kOj1MRVkkbsE0cFq3DuGgro-hbxp0Qd1LmCVW-ruxHIxuuUAPzQ1ncasf177zxuvgJO6Vk4JGdfykHrCVsfAOUoH7Kho0WfL30EpGIJbpPs5N0bTHDPCjjmS7WyTMA6Wv7YYrcs13jZrK4snfu42sFb8NwB_n6hF3s3hXOauJaTI-vMUCwhLh83tj1kFMfeXbexW52Q6KFfF-Je5rZ0CjPYhALmnFwgbN8lMm7C_S9SeE7cW0vtO1J-tgeloIr67A%3D%3D)

| | Dear Friend, [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=71bf84373b414226b8669175d88ce1d7&_e=rMFgUKVrlgVcQ4C4K6-mVTrAd134H6PRRU7L-TvDuvLvqk7Sh8P9kNEnyhadMuTBa0SRQgIVatJuvPNZaP_p7qV-9rXdyaxVWe00CoaRvwYdHCU_1_DOzSqHUvG71zgtwH21rr9nu7UXl5ZXNNIf-kOj1MRVkkbsE0cFq3DuGgro-hbxp0Qd1LmCVW-ruxHIxuuUAPzQ1ncasf177zxuvgJO6Vk4JGdfykHrCVsfAOUDB6yj-KZDESFOcxbf3IPFYjWYnovBIXz8vaUvfJA2m6kIgxPBHul3_EMxZfJKXxX39eDk2__dFfMnW4dpbmeJH9naVVf8DdNYOwuM3uIquyXOvpHoysvNQncej73wK6hIUcvTDSEnepAhONL56RMBVlmacyQuw6GPQfknOeq2IA%3D%3D)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=71bf84373b414226b8669175d88ce1d7&_e=rMFgUKVrlgVcQ4C4K6-mVTrAd134H6PRRU7L-TvDuvLvqk7Sh8P9kNEnyhadMuTBa0SRQgIVatJuvPNZaP_p7qV-9rXdyaxVWe00CoaRvwYdHCU_1_DOzSqHUvG71zgtwH21rr9nu7UXl5ZXNNIf-kOj1MRVkkbsE0cFq3DuGgro-hbxp0Qd1LmCVW-ruxHIxuuUAPzQ1ncasf177zxuvgJO6Vk4JGdfykHrCVsfAOUtv4k7Z-8iT_lN3z6iy9JHhgRgiE4tIYTTFRbxUn2RmaOBbpmqPhoXWPkqMeUSN-kG7geygNsrUNLs_ckaN8f_h_L4fFjAOXSrl088uZu6eeJJi7cZdYscGg53U30nr0CPOc5VpIyzd1xfIg2EfgjUQp6m3--w5XgUX2TIWeIZoQ%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=71bf84373b414226b8669175d88ce1d7&_e=rMFgUKVrlgVcQ4C4K6-mVTrAd134H6PRRU7L-TvDuvLvqk7Sh8P9kNEnyhadMuTBa0SRQgIVatJuvPNZaP_p7qV-9rXdyaxVWe00CoaRvwYdHCU_1_DOzSqHUvG71zgtwH21rr9nu7UXl5ZXNNIf-kOj1MRVkkbsE0cFq3DuGgro-hbxp0Qd1LmCVW-ruxHIxuuUAPzQ1ncasf177zxuvgJO6Vk4JGdfykHrCVsfAOW0NV4UN8ruMTtHrngMKkHVwfhplVwulaQdK7N5DnwRU3gozYedprng_2qJ9kWBXmbs3trLU2TgoVrYBntR67bIvtJJ1SfXSHfeb6VVVHymqpyFLqef8aDpblA3bPwwu-ocMIl1foRk2T9Fx2bIRyI_iG8udbz_gNrxkvEH09Ig8w%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
| | |
---
I love Christmas carols. A favorite of mine is “Silent Night,” and the verse I like most is – _Silent night! Holy night!__Son of God, Love’s pure light_ _radiant, beams from Thy Holy face,_ _with the dawn of redeeming grace,_ So many Christmas carols are tied to memories of mine growing up. For instance, one year I played “Carol of the Bells” in the handbell choir and was responsible for the main part that starts the song. Every time I hear it – even now – my right arm wants to ring the bell, then left, then right, then left! My mom, unbeknownst to me, had the secondary part. Later, she and I were talking and realized we were both playing the major parts of the song. It’s still such a special memory for me, and I think of it every time I hear it. Do you have any favorite Christmas carols? Do you also have any special memories that are tied to certain carols? I’d love to hear from you about it. I think these kinds of Christmas carols are so beautiful and special because they bear witness to the truth about Christmas – that Jesus Christ, our Savior, was born into the world to carry out God’s plan to save us from our sins. And what a message to keep close to our hearts! It’s the same message that the shepherds shared 2,000 years ago. **This is the very message that I chose to speak about in a short, special Christmas video.** Once you’ve watched it, help me spread this message by sharing it with others! “ _The shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all the things they had heard and seen, which were just as they had been told._ ” Luke 2:20 (NIV)
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
| | From the entire Tea Party Patriots Action support team to you, we wish you a Christmas filled with faith, family, and love. May you find peace and happiness as you celebrate Christ’s birth. Merry Christmas! Jenny Beth Martin

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/r_qBntf1J-Ji8DU1QD80wQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbBm4P0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMjI1VwNzcGNCCmWD82uJZebympRSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/r_qBntf1J-Ji8DU1QD80wQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbBm4P0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMjI1VwNzcGNCCmWD82uJZebympRSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/r_qBntf1J-Ji8DU1QD80wQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbBm4P0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMjI1VwNzcGNCCmWD82uJZebympRSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fb03f800612c4d468341ac4c62d442db&_e=DCoaNAijLlEmc9Yp1PRACsgkrSNArVT_vckKcyCFzkr4AOOMMdyETQcKY4I7RE-RaLzksx1RrXQmWJKfGPuuA3MJKqn6GmzRArjeXkeoJ_w1E1q8HmbIwn-U4Fsz5nVh2gFVNi6mKIPdGkvXVBLb8UCRkTM0EZ6J2q_-XxXfDGknQAd317udu1upEq3W2U71aEItfS8beI1OzzBInOtN0M8TL4zfZ5H2O47HBwfEnumPpWfzf9jSw8eR83QBy_H28RnvwctfT1_922mPUbPymjarzhByUV1wPDm8_nINHi8DOYu5AVsmlT-r6ha_GKWm) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fb03f800612c4d468341ac4c62d442db&_e=DCoaNAijLlEmc9Yp1PRACsgkrSNArVT_vckKcyCFzkr4AOOMMdyETQcKY4I7RE-RaLzksx1RrXQmWJKfGPuuA3MJKqn6GmzRArjeXkeoJ_w1E1q8HmbIwn-U4Fsz5nVh2gFVNi6mKIPdGkvXVBLb8SkhsxXpFX2Z8nJLFVu8YibxoqjgfcSoI2uwAWQbd6YZUqE8R4hiE1LOxx9y6iR8yiQNV5QO4gj1C7-zVUhCVj_obj-UKSQ72ivXyxIiCAA-xYU8keIzirs2pm4sRhsxSvjeCXUH4GAXKI8CwyaP4zh_VUbu4N7f2el4WxRp9fjX)

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=714710c47cb94b43a56e386fe50dca75&_e=rx5BYkQ79aLwySOVL-y4_cBrMiT-r5iZoPAZfiyN2_5Bk7fth6keJEKSiyYkd2sm5L5JsDDmP-s_SyQMcxVPk5HR0MiGsX28Aa5tD9nxtzDbLNIvzqSgDVAlSIHeFkDXw4xC8mDr5qKlmZlNG_6un-pcqd7LhNkrKKwOAubwax54wtEfECiZQy-Ek7Nq8_fwWu4O65woufnS6RFc0zoI6wOqwDqBVHULmLxmQIbTZVYLoPG_PgCFozUgTxLUGj0iAW5kWn2cOxyQbNlsj_HKzgY0GGl5xozTfrfnDI0RWZ-8Fv5bqKxOLQBWme4on0G0). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=714710c47cb94b43a56e386fe50dca75&_e=rx5BYkQ79aLwySOVL-y4_cBrMiT-r5iZoPAZfiyN2_5Bk7fth6keJEKSiyYkd2sm5L5JsDDmP-s_SyQMcxVPk5HR0MiGsX28Aa5tD9nxtzDbLNIvzqSgDVAlSIHeFkDXw4xC8mDr5qKlmZlNG_6un5SPum38sFfMeAMXTz4oP99KPhnWb8qRwRspyR8ChoDN132QxUfyxm-Vf2gEfxGP-Ic6hyijZO91-w4gh326TYq6YwrzgrUxDQ8yqmaQ0RYkkM1BkAhcp-3zWnJnHLgnqeUlreA4kphgkTtCce7hJdSd66iOqnoUkwkQw4AP98y7) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=714710c47cb94b43a56e386fe50dca75&_e=rx5BYkQ79aLwySOVL-y4_cBrMiT-r5iZoPAZfiyN2_5Bk7fth6keJEKSiyYkd2sm5L5JsDDmP-s_SyQMcxVPk5HR0MiGsX28Aa5tD9nxtzDbLNIvzqSgDVAlSIHeFkDXw4xC8mDr5qKlmZlNG_6un1tTtLBR1BsFzR4LBmTlOXhGQST4V6wd-iPWcMYh-ZScQ-ubkcMEn1oBR2RR1zWOQvhd3wHiHdESIo784ozkN7AT83Zh7cHTkkZqRstfBA2TVf0zysfDiep1jSSUoIur9C4bpoWYVAS9dbzwrOs4j7kTiTqMqs7VgccYpCEFxW_4) on these survival food kits while you can.

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9bc74680f6d647988161f3d33ca9d7b4&_e=Aan40ZDyletHpAEMtcVBbeUR-S4_8kPy4i2eBI84H9USfZJ-vYhvDorzCR2Ca2xh6YbNQ7mvEe5CHURIaRKtspw7CQuRf0td0KBBBnRw1ucY2813gyVP_i8pL_WLLQ-9DOnyesDsY3tgMu2M22TRd9Qv1AKiM-NAD9dDtWeN4oSNjgOqSxpi77n3kc2Ba2cim0lH4vV37FPar9NDNKUMcQwqhs7l1Go7GKRdDJSXZb0hWHuZ1YQriHCtPspjveJ9U3HO8N03DiQb_Mt-Xt46EZgoZ_v0D-4tXHAIjSoY6s8yn6JV8af_OJzwFqdfD79Oiersv73C6eOEDMG8JD_wlLo7BiwME_yDuykQnysEhlfYXy_lIZ4VIuT7mf1ySsMBy66P15TymGKfm6OcyqpoWg%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9bc74680f6d647988161f3d33ca9d7b4&_e=Aan40ZDyletHpAEMtcVBbeUR-S4_8kPy4i2eBI84H9USfZJ-vYhvDorzCR2Ca2xh6YbNQ7mvEe5CHURIaRKtspw7CQuRf0td0KBBBnRw1ucY2813gyVP_i8pL_WLLQ-9DOnyesDsY3tgMu2M22TRd9Qv1AKiM-NAD9dDtWeN4oSNjgOqSxpi77n3kc2Ba2cim0lH4vV37FPar9NDNKUMcQwqhs7l1Go7GKRdDJSXZb2lTh4s7Q77UCd422gEKanq4AkQLbluIHOXvknMiCsHA33jHyDqivEC3VqE6uSD5MzsLl3DVS7JK9t1C6dYHEMHVLFH4lQ-Wnev5qv120tZ4V7rI8RPDc_8MRBbpYB7Lp3mVjUj0I5Z-jnu54zS1BT6rHaUvbI5T3XtBvXHFIHJgA%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29d34fbc5f0f41578803ac96e381a05b&_e=QEWS5QbS42Vh9jah6R4hOWY7qlmJCYKzJ02tU5Zs0ythGsClCkodbWuA877EWSkGU3RZ4D6b8W_JVvEXfdZP4BADT4ufxsk7AcWumTvKf-Jn5xPgVMKJ5FF0sDKjr7JZh7Pgq5AJEmS4kd19Az5ZTbUnM8ZKLdOAvTQoXxAD8P6TBsDMmaQWf7tQP2VN_n3yV7KJDxz1Bun6a-Nvo6IsufGr_ZrMBNog7mrxYhIot1jRQ8dSGlBmJxpKPdnHKvJcCamWOlDzrw-M6XF0Ls18H0HAwdYX-X1inadLfLuMf6Yy8uyO0GxQP1ecHHR41bxg27bTDBcmIxrAUnrCMZJlWoPITT3f_7FtcYt4gRnAHpQgmt-2qZlRz57a1AQDKKstyqZEcr5PT7WsBsEWG0YzEQb7fVvyTYL3FxvrbtDgH_Q%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29d34fbc5f0f41578803ac96e381a05b&_e=QEWS5QbS42Vh9jah6R4hOWY7qlmJCYKzJ02tU5Zs0ythGsClCkodbWuA877EWSkGU3RZ4D6b8W_JVvEXfdZP4BADT4ufxsk7AcWumTvKf-Jn5xPgVMKJ5FF0sDKjr7JZh7Pgq5AJEmS4kd19Az5ZTbUnM8ZKLdOAvTQoXxAD8P6TBsDMmaQWf7tQP2VN_n3yV7KJDxz1Bun6a-Nvo6IsufGr_ZrMBNog7mrxYhIot1jRQ8dSGlBmJxpKPdnHKvJcgjxmD-AAmhYgWWTndD25x2IT747xqCKT15JCYwlt29T69opLKfRjBxPJOYv7uOWeohSfGx7Z_NQ3MgeGsAq2gAYosktfSaZ9DIsSeiXwRe7wLQg12dYLfmkG1HoIYeqFDTAEwq6b7n1u_cXSkBtQX1-rLR9VLO9BkyUBOeUcro4%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29d34fbc5f0f41578803ac96e381a05b&_e=QEWS5QbS42Vh9jah6R4hOWY7qlmJCYKzJ02tU5Zs0ythGsClCkodbWuA877EWSkGU3RZ4D6b8W_JVvEXfdZP4BADT4ufxsk7AcWumTvKf-Jn5xPgVMKJ5FF0sDKjr7JZh7Pgq5AJEmS4kd19Az5ZTbUnM8ZKLdOAvTQoXxAD8P6TBsDMmaQWf7tQP2VN_n3yV7KJDxz1Bun6a-Nvo6IsufGr_ZrMBNog7mrxYhIot1jRQ8dSGlBmJxpKPdnHKvJcGz76IXvE8WS8_80lQR68EooFqhh_4AqBP38zO2ZAKOOo55tl_WELaZNGQFgQoJWR0Se-uPji8TDsAf7J5GRedZb9K7nRh4qWPTXwHv2vul82Ty8GDDXrlJ-y6jZ2xpD2xEK2wTLJpTz1j3yaDZWwzDclFbUZUSqEATMLRfNnvZI%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29d34fbc5f0f41578803ac96e381a05b&_e=QEWS5QbS42Vh9jah6R4hOWY7qlmJCYKzJ02tU5Zs0ythGsClCkodbWuA877EWSkGU3RZ4D6b8W_JVvEXfdZP4BADT4ufxsk7AcWumTvKf-Jn5xPgVMKJ5FF0sDKjr7JZh7Pgq5AJEmS4kd19Az5ZTbUnM8ZKLdOAvTQoXxAD8P6TBsDMmaQWf7tQP2VN_n3yV7KJDxz1Bun6a-Nvo6IsufGr_ZrMBNog7mrxYhIot1jRQ8dSGlBmJxpKPdnHKvJc-hklOV5YkdkbKJ72alUhce3tMsE5e0A4PFC22dj7w1Rj5z5b2VKKmAbsnrV4Sb92RuASPihtAtpOn4PNvFljGs87V32BnbVRizLdiv7dVeFNOrirtIjTCTh6ihNE_OXUEq9wE37xjVfPj-M4ZGBGV2vNoji8f3-RQUUU4WjEyxg%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29d34fbc5f0f41578803ac96e381a05b&_e=QEWS5QbS42Vh9jah6R4hOWY7qlmJCYKzJ02tU5Zs0ythGsClCkodbWuA877EWSkGU3RZ4D6b8W_JVvEXfdZP4BADT4ufxsk7AcWumTvKf-Jn5xPgVMKJ5FF0sDKjr7JZh7Pgq5AJEmS4kd19Az5ZTbUnM8ZKLdOAvTQoXxAD8P6TBsDMmaQWf7tQP2VN_n3yV7KJDxz1Bun6a-Nvo6IsufGr_ZrMBNog7mrxYhIot1jRQ8dSGlBmJxpKPdnHKvJcobH5662yv5zYreAf62x1zDKNM3WbFJqpyFJt2bIeyiFMXhLu1mcGsc2acmF8xtReX3LaTGfwmGY2XlgyUFcT4zFtpOJrRktPrBwD08zWUU2op-Ytlh6rFTa763IxUQ_SOJ9Z4Ji9T-fPQuYhKxx78BlVQkquVyDXk_bCIHgi98Y%3D)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70b7587a69e54cebb925e54eac18d2db&_e=v35TAys-kDy9TLRfe-_Hr7eikQFjpwRY5_HhFRrWcZf83HW6wT5zG5yclyjEVsNqM8MyR96zw9Lo8bu2druWaAltPcE5FlPgV_OaonvUuZTNOsq-uY_x9OTukf6hLIAgg7JaHPP0qdvKJs1IQZXn8cVK1VBfQ16h-9Dl4fGkXhnd7OYBksHuZ2uaXR70E8_MXD2U3ZZ-xKVKg02Plqk56sJTaTxQXNbLKlvrQzEIIkDwpgWMaqSlyJtZwPOVbmSVQfcUWjyTvpS8PZ8uqn-4CGo70JeBn6RopsQ_fA80KlhkUf925gUHIXUGLd0UnpJfCTghPWBGnU-mXt589R2vGMa3aXvWOEhEY_lrV0wp7PUQt83uJEsqgWHrqFb5if7YRRbvwjnnQGHE5Toww29QXg%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70b7587a69e54cebb925e54eac18d2db&_e=v35TAys-kDy9TLRfe-_Hr7eikQFjpwRY5_HhFRrWcZf83HW6wT5zG5yclyjEVsNqM8MyR96zw9Lo8bu2druWaAltPcE5FlPgV_OaonvUuZTNOsq-uY_x9OTukf6hLIAgg7JaHPP0qdvKJs1IQZXn8cVK1VBfQ16h-9Dl4fGkXhnd7OYBksHuZ2uaXR70E8_MXD2U3ZZ-xKVKg02Plqk56sJTaTxQXNbLKlvrQzEIIkC-tvNVYZi2HMw22CxGqvoQi4m0kYjIo7RXfvPIe177j987d8czVB5v4gxX9ehLHEM_7OviZdd1JesOKM3E0L8LvdVCMZiO4e2uN81GmxvZ8oRkKGN-vQvlxwyTgQBA6VbSU8gMq0DFtC4fHSieqzjugQPj_GutJh6cirfXo2v05A%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70b7587a69e54cebb925e54eac18d2db&_e=v35TAys-kDy9TLRfe-_Hr7eikQFjpwRY5_HhFRrWcZf83HW6wT5zG5yclyjEVsNqM8MyR96zw9Lo8bu2druWaAltPcE5FlPgV_OaonvUuZTNOsq-uY_x9OTukf6hLIAgg7JaHPP0qdvKJs1IQZXn8cVK1VBfQ16h-9Dl4fGkXhnd7OYBksHuZ2uaXR70E8_MXD2U3ZZ-xKVKg02Plqk56sJTaTxQXNbLKlvrQzEIIkCOcyCu10pXDr8AW4UMrgrkwez79NpM-jZMQ6Fm-WpuBOputFdY1QOA6zru2fXApTwzTNMbbURaPQhi1Gyz-Z2CEsLBAM_wFeObqJaigYZokKtRJEKd08XjDsbW-84_SlFiH1Sb5KHeDFQod-hqZ0nd0DzgIQUNhgNSXJm2XkiDlQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

clean_body: The survey will only take a few moments of your time This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

subject: Merry Christmas from my family to yours!

body:

Merry Christmas friend!

Today, Casey and I are so grateful for the opportunity to spend some time with our family, particularly our kids.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9e12bff9a8849ff99b2da171d5c3f25ca9af8a9fe66e4b4348d2beeee56175d807e26c50c77d6ed0882f7834257d63d1003c710bde2ad96a041d4634be8ea2c4

As much fun as it's been to field questions about Santa Claus over the last few weeks, we're taking today to reflect on the true reason for the season: the birth of Jesus Christ in Bethlehem over 2000 years ago.

As one of the most significant events in all of human history, I hope you and your family get the opportunity to enjoy some time appreciating all that this has meant to our world and the influence it's had on our blessed nation. I believe He gives us hope as we finish off 2023 and go into the new year.

I pray that this holiday season brings you peace and good tidings with your loved ones. You have given me the greatest gift by allowing me to be your voice on this campaign trail. Merry Christmas to you and yours, friend.

God bless,

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9e12bff9a8849ff99b2da171d5c3f25ca9af8a9fe66e4b4348d2beeee56175d807e26c50c77d6ed0882f7834257d63d1003c710bde2ad96a041d4634be8ea2c4

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9e12bff9a8849ff99b2da171d5c3f25ca9af8a9fe66e4b4348d2beeee56175d807e26c50c77d6ed0882f7834257d63d1003c710bde2ad96a041d4634be8ea2c4

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Laurel Imer
subject: Merry Christmas to you and yours!
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Laurel Imer and is not approved by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
I want to share with you a Christmas Message that is near and dear to my heart...
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aS5-GmUP5hTWZIVa8QjGxycDYSdL9cNe-vf_UwSSpDizDD0TljjkC54fFdyj86mhA-n4U3QmbMvY4fOZUEbZzIL9fGZ79SvD6K0mmeYduEReMKAV1XiBfX0Agks8trVXNT0WoWrsAWiS7NG-GnlNcQq6Jr2ia089&c=XdNT_6rBC6XpWpO_O9w6xkzO2vaZa-Ed_Yd6NQcHAbOSjzdGGqlzJg==&ch=ZHDusXYdsr1xLQCrxUFTRlYbBVT2UAkYXQA54JP5El7Nke_1MxRfKA==)
---
---
| Friend,
I would like to wish you a very Merry Christmas!
This holiday season I want to take the opportunity to remind you what Christmas is all about. The birth of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ. Far too often we all get caught up in the hustle and bustle of Christmas, we get caught up in trying to keep up with the Joneses, and who has the best gift.
We get so caught up that we tend to forget that the entire reason for the season is that we were given the greatest gift we could ask for, eternal life for those who believe.
While we all celebrate the birth of Christ, I hope you also find time to fellowship with your families, friends, and loved ones.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aS5-GmUP5hTWZIVa8QjGxycDYSdL9cNe-vf_UwSSpDizDD0TljjkC4KiC-kbKrBpWMv6ZVslDQ9oUSz2kLFa5SSJrtRsYrC8tGcCf_82mLlk4E0bM1kygrHDS4FfiBus2VQTG4-6DzXGkalPqoJWcz0xOq117qUQ3wLHklCTv9n-Q2ONOd0FFIkeRkOSlsUq7qIyJP9Sib4AtRcPa50Z0ckkB89thmzp&c=XdNT_6rBC6XpWpO_O9w6xkzO2vaZa-Ed_Yd6NQcHAbOSjzdGGqlzJg==&ch=ZHDusXYdsr1xLQCrxUFTRlYbBVT2UAkYXQA54JP5El7Nke_1MxRfKA==)
---
| As 2023 comes to an end, let us all look towards the future, not get stuck in the past, and learn to let go of the grudges, emotions, and hardships that can bring us down.
I am reminded of Matthew 5:9: "Happy are people who make peace, because they will be called God's children."
Let us all know God's love this Christmas Season and may we all be prosperous in the New Year.
Merry Christmas from my family to yours and may you have a Happy New Year!
Best Wishes,
---

name: Russell Prescott
subject: Merry Christmas
body:
Wishing you and your family a Merry Christmas
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kr22zzTEw9R1_Wowe44mFb6LVwPMkhKCBWNO511QfEBhmEF_W0Eihr0LezuGg5_TQeg9T8pWVPi5YdFhtXBPSFk_s6O2RUj9UTAwv06RHKmhEtJvlzmKDO9xGn4O5BhObdGMvl5S7JBGWkMZjg5HDbzwKQtlVeEN&c=Q2n4iqyDMPGEU_2S9SDr-aNmhY7Lmbx_kxg0Ht2wRXIbuvEARahcaQ==&ch=PtUqDGqFYWekqTSpd42BiJ3dsJfKFjNfbA7zgrsY0ofTeedtBk2ndQ==)
---
| Peter,
As we gather with family and friends to celebrate the warmth of the holidays, I wanted to extend my heartfelt wishes to you for a Merry Christmas.
Let us take this special and festive occasion to reflect on our blessings and express gratitude for being able to call our great state of New Hampshire home.
May your day be filled with laughter, your hearts with love, and your Christmas Day with moments of joy. From my family to yours, we want to wish you and your family a Merry Christmas.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kr22zzTEw9R1_Wowe44mFb6LVwPMkhKCBWNO511QfEBhmEF_W0Eihr0LezuGg5_TQeg9T8pWVPi5YdFhtXBPSFk_s6O2RUj9UTAwv06RHKmhEtJvlzmKDO9xGn4O5BhObdGMvl5S7JBGWkMZjg5HDbzwKQtlVeEN&c=Q2n4iqyDMPGEU_2S9SDr-aNmhY7Lmbx_kxg0Ht2wRXIbuvEARahcaQ==&ch=PtUqDGqFYWekqTSpd42BiJ3dsJfKFjNfbA7zgrsY0ofTeedtBk2ndQ==)
---
---
| Thanks, Russell Prescott Republican for Congress NH-01
---
---
---
---
|

---
---
| [PrescottforCongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kr22zzTEw9R1_Wowe44mFb6LVwPMkhKCBWNO511QfEBhmEF_W0Eihso5QCYlhYqOSbkfJjjviC_etLr48Dd49fWaZ3jzJH48P-zkEdaMh3ktMX8TUwSAxsS3PedTbpdOg6PvHrNwch21yC1egXwMFCFRoH-KeQ0z&c=Q2n4iqyDMPGEU_2S9SDr-aNmhY7Lmbx_kxg0Ht2wRXIbuvEARahcaQ==&ch=PtUqDGqFYWekqTSpd42BiJ3dsJfKFjNfbA7zgrsY0ofTeedtBk2ndQ==)
---
| More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.
---
|
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kr22zzTEw9R1_Wowe44mFb6LVwPMkhKCBWNO511QfEBhmEF_W0Eihso5QCYlhYqOs0WbqJ5s1rjeAkY8TBvnrQhtPtn5K-GBaMDpcnz1MNo_2RgnrJDKLXHSIxhVvY1IvO_cZ91s6EVfIZEXc-0duobveiFv1QUz26cgn4bGuoM=&c=Q2n4iqyDMPGEU_2S9SDr-aNmhY7Lmbx_kxg0Ht2wRXIbuvEARahcaQ==&ch=PtUqDGqFYWekqTSpd42BiJ3dsJfKFjNfbA7zgrsY0ofTeedtBk2ndQ==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kr22zzTEw9R1_Wowe44mFb6LVwPMkhKCBWNO511QfEBhmEF_W0Eihso5QCYlhYqObZ6Py3D2ATY5SFde3RhE_kdl6hX2FYHZ89Z5E0ER4_PCfJ_zO5fjXBn6WSOLI_wo13S1_1W1DaMan1qUYQ_VQ50hASCXjtFr&c=Q2n4iqyDMPGEU_2S9SDr-aNmhY7Lmbx_kxg0Ht2wRXIbuvEARahcaQ==&ch=PtUqDGqFYWekqTSpd42BiJ3dsJfKFjNfbA7zgrsY0ofTeedtBk2ndQ==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kr22zzTEw9R1_Wowe44mFb6LVwPMkhKCBWNO511QfEBhmEF_W0Eihso5QCYlhYqOHIg9ne1sk7612rU8Wj47Q8pqx8PA6osdIZla0ElfxU7z1yCagMh_eQGCE5q_HKh0OHXYAP49ZDxZxN-PBGyCm2akeI0wv97SpPCHW3jOIeXbqbXa86P5wQ==&c=Q2n4iqyDMPGEU_2S9SDr-aNmhY7Lmbx_kxg0Ht2wRXIbuvEARahcaQ==&ch=PtUqDGqFYWekqTSpd42BiJ3dsJfKFjNfbA7zgrsY0ofTeedtBk2ndQ==)

name: Matt Dolan
subject: Wishing You a Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO
body:
From my family to yours, Peter!

|

---
Peter!

I wanted to reach out personally to wish you and your family a Merry Christmas and a Happy Holiday season!

**_As the year comes to a close, we find ourselves reflecting on the incredible journey we've undertaken together. Your unwavering support has been the driving force behind our success, and as we celebrate the festive season, we want to take a moment to express our heartfelt gratitude._**

May this season be filled with joy, laughter, and cherished moments. Your dedication and generosity have made a meaningful impact on our campaign, and we are truly grateful to have you by our side.

As we look forward to the coming year, we are excited about the possibilities that lie ahead and the positive change we can create together. Thank you for being an integral part of our community and for making a difference.

**Wishing you a warm and wonderful holiday season. May the new year bring you happiness, good health, and continued success.**

From me and everyone in the Dolan family, Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!

Thank you for your continued support,

Matt Dolan
