May the new year bring you happiness, good health, and continued success. From me and everyone in the Dolan family, Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays! Thank you for your continued support, Matt Dolan | | | PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b97876cace954d278cfeacfe5e9218b5&_e=bnKLbYTPS-uF4G5gmF6-HWa9TIa7tKfkPZ0l6aFJaqPavjTYRfs7byHOgVd-qs4-KhczIcP_k1VEUUIpJHt9RB5v3c-2pBLpUVCd9i3QKaRVTkTmS7xBApitAsqnGuFE5-Vy26Z9ATeCLGRsoqapCIo1TPJaYWE0aiIKrXeahyBLb88KZCrc7GM1gNHqmhFyl9k064kxV9nqYtAvfJ8V4sKOy7Mtwt2mbJDblReejdYY6frCKOZbEWWKF_oPJuaznDh7CJOYCb7HwAWEgmcDFgCEf8zW-M8WpO2_0fZAc1dGi7cuUDFDv-pvmeNpbDwr) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b97876cace954d278cfeacfe5e9218b5&_e=bnKLbYTPS-uF4G5gmF6-HWa9TIa7tKfkPZ0l6aFJaqPavjTYRfs7byHOgVd-qs4-KhczIcP_k1VEUUIpJHt9RB5v3c-2pBLpUVCd9i3QKaRVTkTmS7xBApitAsqnGuFE5-Vy26Z9ATeCLGRsoqapCLa3dj00j5BomoaTk4beDZfalRx7VmYSNxfk8KqybjI7mJ0H8nePs1-nua7nLew7Yvy6uPZo4-hPwCuYemqO0LtbKXudC2chxUktk5tK44kLo9zVW26tRzwXcHqJJ1_VkaLwbi1SjXl1rcnteFtHdvu7_yoWVs-UnRXjfY-VqqpV) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b97876cace954d278cfeacfe5e9218b5&_e=bnKLbYTPS-uF4G5gmF6-HWa9TIa7tKfkPZ0l6aFJaqPavjTYRfs7byHOgVd-qs4-KhczIcP_k1VEUUIpJHt9RB5v3c-2pBLpUVCd9i3QKaRVTkTmS7xBApitAsqnGuFE5-Vy26Z9ATeCLGRsoqapCLjYxHrOLkd3nRDY4rgT-a7oCdQ_kEC_GCcfMNMTpNqQaxkPcF3_ZXUSrYc38uL7on3dMSkrbBRVvJFkZbEfOdDzfHjieBFTp5Em_gNoUy9c8boJUd9a30AiTW9cvgW3f60AcJzxl1C-TLKqsywTXM7UhnNVWVwYP0baTatlnoEa). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b97876cace954d278cfeacfe5e9218b5&_e=bnKLbYTPS-uF4G5gmF6-HWa9TIa7tKfkPZ0l6aFJaqPavjTYRfs7byHOgVd-qs4-KhczIcP_k1VEUUIpJHt9RB5v3c-2pBLpUVCd9i3QKaRVTkTmS7xBApitAsqnGuFE5-Vy26Z9ATeCLGRsoqapCP5PkTmU50zzcCgmJYL2azIq3bw5Y3NQ5k8uEN-pyVB0GiMOiIU5t9634VQ7RvOWxeePGJ_CxpHc-w9zQr0Xf4mkaMRKa8RSA8kH-WxpsMh88jsQvtOwcmBMJtofHVXrl_pOJ0pq5pLLIXVGfgKIILhYeUOjEzFtCiQN84rB7n9q)

name: Conservatives Give
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c621a65ec33d4727930e3211863dd0ea&_e=5Y4_tJ_3HETm_X3X_tQkZzLb1D7tZjQf3AdEGQP71SwX8IFWj4o3jdLGNXMfYsbGclMJKxxYrU0X8N-IrH33wKxZYRS-I4_Nf8_UH4QphuCrdbEhW6oa0Bbu9-bGDtTxAzG06WJqONvcyWhpU2ZSPAtHUk_uBTPpi7vd1F_l1aOhI2M_CL5XxTEz9JS8oBng9rvPs5iyi7E69lbd6ZIuYhsYYbjvn97vq9rjPA1gVBCdQTlsrmI_cMS_lreiEe2-xcWaaIj7YE49eQp8ReY0c7GGBZofUxGzet7e--9onzRer9uQ3QLqrAInHPntLc8pu17ahpwABzJ12TCCrV3F_9AzsRnt32Lv-J6B2GGIzcXBQYrgt4t28CqUUZk3hFmdHiTzH4n8VdhbAAUAVDsTHAJn4mA9SsnwXM9UQVpPyJQ%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c621a65ec33d4727930e3211863dd0ea&_e=5Y4_tJ_3HETm_X3X_tQkZzLb1D7tZjQf3AdEGQP71SwX8IFWj4o3jdLGNXMfYsbGclMJKxxYrU0X8N-IrH33wKxZYRS-I4_Nf8_UH4QphuCrdbEhW6oa0Bbu9-bGDtTxAzG06WJqONvcyWhpU2ZSPAtHUk_uBTPpi7vd1F_l1aOhI2M_CL5XxTEz9JS8oBng9rvPs5iyi7E69lbd6ZIuYhsYYbjvn97vq9rjPA1gVBCdQTlsrmI_cMS_lreiEe2-JwgQy4DkXJCmL4e1tSDwPXxFPoAmtuc6FQ7ln4PNuwW571uVDXzYkP1zIj417pVZ38rujq9z7ZEvEhUI2R3pqwdKwEfl1n6ANCxQXWUjcCGXfN-T6e7ZiTNyJeAUp8VijA6BbK7LE-HF1EGNViX9i6AFV8ArffkT7b9T_Tqpb_A%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c621a65ec33d4727930e3211863dd0ea&_e=5Y4_tJ_3HETm_X3X_tQkZzLb1D7tZjQf3AdEGQP71SwX8IFWj4o3jdLGNXMfYsbGclMJKxxYrU0X8N-IrH33wKxZYRS-I4_Nf8_UH4QphuCrdbEhW6oa0Bbu9-bGDtTxAzG06WJqONvcyWhpU2ZSPAtHUk_uBTPpi7vd1F_l1aOhI2M_CL5XxTEz9JS8oBng9rvPs5iyi7E69lbd6ZIuYhsYYbjvn97vq9rjPA1gVBCdQTlsrmI_cMS_lreiEe2-KjsbTbpE8i62U5b4cwRjfhIWCOtfH0AF5QK-L5NW_oelYiNn2gymmfhhLNj_q11eooSFeIeb_XRwR6VvQnaz5Xd2d_9WJq1_6sTAxVnrXQCf8WAmAs3xFNSL_XDo8BD_HbUV-AA5wfeUj5MziQ8GjTpSgyh8IV-vp2pNS1xb6WE%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c621a65ec33d4727930e3211863dd0ea&_e=5Y4_tJ_3HETm_X3X_tQkZzLb1D7tZjQf3AdEGQP71SwX8IFWj4o3jdLGNXMfYsbGclMJKxxYrU0X8N-IrH33wKxZYRS-I4_Nf8_UH4QphuCrdbEhW6oa0Bbu9-bGDtTxAzG06WJqONvcyWhpU2ZSPAtHUk_uBTPpi7vd1F_l1aOhI2M_CL5XxTEz9JS8oBng9rvPs5iyi7E69lbd6ZIuYhsYYbjvn97vq9rjPA1gVBCdQTlsrmI_cMS_lreiEe2-2DEtz895K0FKE1DY2uMs4eVXb6Uqv7KYj0T6GLmwYvhE169YCgCrJCmxwvDLOEwLXtjeZpeZNeH-2ianZPgQUDnw1J4NuDHz83nrDflKkLtlSBDwybXM47EdS_q_eR01VxiFbcGpmGHIVsIr2v9iZXXnjQuQ9fFwzPNLzyHd7-s%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c621a65ec33d4727930e3211863dd0ea&_e=5Y4_tJ_3HETm_X3X_tQkZzLb1D7tZjQf3AdEGQP71SwX8IFWj4o3jdLGNXMfYsbGclMJKxxYrU0X8N-IrH33wKxZYRS-I4_Nf8_UH4QphuCrdbEhW6oa0Bbu9-bGDtTxAzG06WJqONvcyWhpU2ZSPAtHUk_uBTPpi7vd1F_l1aOhI2M_CL5XxTEz9JS8oBng9rvPs5iyi7E69lbd6ZIuYhsYYbjvn97vq9rjPA1gVBCdQTlsrmI_cMS_lreiEe2-zwAwZ9HufiDNIe7fvWdeMEohSHmq1AWpOsb5uo5wjwpr5Blbo0mZpDUW2Sx-GLZ0uLvs__SQeSMB95Gg0fzPgG1JOVGl7z-yXGKuHn_J0tc1SWCH6tG0sajykKnWGQ-zeYd3LKWGEOcg76ctBQzcsQPT0iUxTb2EYjEvBQIVeXc%3D)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Peter, Merry Christmas from my family to yours!

Christmas is a time for reflection, gratitude, and togetherness, and it is my sincere hope that you find joy and peace in the company of family and friends. As we gather around the Christmas tree, exchange gifts, and share delicious meals, let us remember the true spirit of the season – kindness, generosity, and the love that binds us all.

This year has presented its share of challenges, but it has also shown the resilience and strength of our community. Your support and engagement have been instrumental in our collective efforts to overcome obstacles and work towards a brighter future. As we look forward to the coming year, I am optimistic about the positive changes we can achieve together.

Thank you for allowing me the honor of serving you, and for being an integral part of our wonderful community. Your feedback and concerns have been invaluable, and I am committed to continuing to work tirelessly on your behalf.

>From my family to yours, I wish you a Merry Christmas. May this holiday season be a time of joy, reflection, and connection.

Sincerely,

The Williams Family

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Merry Christmas from my family to yours! Christmas is a time for reflection, gratitude, and togetherness, and it is my sincere hope that you find joy and peace in the company of family and friends. As we gather around the Christmas tree, exchange gifts, and share delicious meals, let us remember the true spirit of the season – kindness, generosity, and the love that binds us all. This year has presented its share of challenges, but it has also shown the resilience and strength of our community. Your support and engagement have been instrumental in our collective efforts to overcome obstacles and work towards a brighter future. As we look forward to the coming year, I am optimistic about the positive changes we can achieve together. Thank you for allowing me the honor of serving you, and for being an integral part of our wonderful community. Your feedback and concerns have been invaluable, and I am committed to continuing to work tirelessly on your behalf. From my family to yours, I wish you a Merry Christmas. May this holiday season be a time of joy, reflection, and connection. Sincerely, The Williams Family | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. CADDO ST. PMB #174 CLEBURNE, TX 76031 Stay connected with our campaign and be part of the movement. Follow Roger on social media for updates, volunteer to support the cause, or reach out to him directly. By joining Team Williams, you will make a difference in your community. | A Note For You, From Roger My commitment to our great state and country is unwavering, and I am grateful to have my wife Patty, our two daughters, and YOU standing beside me on this journey. | Roger (Sent from my iPhone) 10 N. Caddo St, PMB #174, Cleburne, TX 76031

name: Dean Team
subject: 🎄Warm Wishes for a Cozy Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean 24
body:
https://www.dean24.com/ [https://www.dean24.com/]
Hi Friend,
Hope this e-mail finds you in the midst of some holiday cheer! From our family to yours we want to wish you the merriest Christmas and to say thanks for being a part of our awesome journey this year.
As we spend some quality time with family and friends, let's not forget the magic that comes with spreading a little love and hope. Our campaign has been a wild ride, and it's all because of amazing folks like you who believe in making a difference.
Together, we've been working to give our nation a shot of hope, especially to those who could use a bit of extra cheer.
Whether it's our youngest family members dreaming big dreams or folks facing some tough times, let's all help each other out where we can. We know when we come together, incredible things happen.
As we get ready to dive into a brand new year, let's carry the holiday spirit with us. Here's to a future full of opportunities, equality, and good times for everyone in our community.
Happy Holidays,
Dean Team

clean_body: [] Hi Friend, Hope this e-mail finds you in the midst of some holiday cheer! From our family to yours we want to wish you the merriest Christmas and to say thanks for being a part of our awesome journey this year. As we spend some quality time with family and friends, let's not forget the magic that comes with spreading a little love and hope. Our campaign has been a wild ride, and it's all because of amazing folks like you who believe in making a difference. Together, we've been working to give our nation a shot of hope, especially to those who could use a bit of extra cheer. Whether it's our youngest family members dreaming big dreams or folks facing some tough times, let's all help each other out where we can. We know when we come together, incredible things happen. As we get ready to dive into a brand new year, let's carry the holiday spirit with us. Here's to a future full of opportunities, equality, and good times for everyone in our community. Happy Holidays, Dean Team [] [] [] [] [] Contributions to Dean 24 are not tax deductible. name: Diane Sare
subject: May Your Christmas be Beautiful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023_christmas&n=1)
---
Friend
### Adoration of the Magi by Jan de Bray 1658
[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k8YQdpV0rTcYK7qtd0n4N7MS0lq-SyN0sMD08tqh3Vy8gIiEnAIHEnoUG8Zb-1EuiQ&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023_christmas&n=2) As billions of people around the world celebrate the birth of Christ, and reflect on the universal truth that each human being, whether Christian, Muslim, Jew or any other faith, or none, is born in the image of the Creator, we must remember that the birthplace of Jesus, Bethlehem, is now filled with great pain and sorrow. In an enraged attempt to justify the mass slaughter of children in Gaza, Israeli Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu said, "History does not favor Jesus Christ over Genghis Khan." What Mr. Netanyahu and his British and American patrons have failed to grasp is that "power" does not lie in the ability to "force" other human beings through violence, including death, to comply with arbitrary decrees. Our power and our freedom reside in our ability to transcend the end of our mortal existence by acting to ensure the immortality of humanity as a whole. Christ had to choose at Gethsemane whether to avoid an early and gruesome death, by "letting the cup pass" and perhaps living a few years longer in meaningless obscurity, condeming mankind to death, or to accept the bitter cup on behalf of a population riddled with sin, granting them, and himself, immortality. So, as our so-called "leaders" need to be reminded, history has been made, not by the tyrants, willing to kill the most people, but by those like Joan of Arc, Abraham Lincon, Martin Luther King, Jr., and millions of others whose names we don't know, who chose to risk or lose their lives for the greater good of us all. \--Diane
* * *

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/OtlLPFUAw3bSWeRvWnw9yA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbDW6P0S9aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2FkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlLXN0YXRlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA3MDVOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlc3RhdGVzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9WUVTTk9fUEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMjI1VwNzcGNCCmWDC4iJZecYYeFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/OtlLPFUAw3bSWeRvWnw9yA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbDW6P0S9aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2FkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlLXN0YXRlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA3MDVOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlc3RhdGVzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9WUVTTk9fUEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMjI1VwNzcGNCCmWDC4iJZecYYeFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/OtlLPFUAw3bSWeRvWnw9yA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbDW6P0S9aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2FkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlLXN0YXRlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA3MDVOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlc3RhdGVzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9WUVTTk9fUEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMjI1VwNzcGNCCmWDC4iJZecYYeFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) [NO](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/OtlLPFUAw3bSWeRvWnw9yA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbDW6P0S9aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2FkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlLXN0YXRlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA3MDVOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlc3RhdGVzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9WUVTTk9fUEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMjI1VwNzcGNCCmWDC4iJZecYYeFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/OtlLPFUAw3bSWeRvWnw9yA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbDW6P0S9aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2FkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlLXN0YXRlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA3MDVOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFkbWluaXN0cmF0aXZlc3RhdGVzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9WUVTTk9fUEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMjI1VwNzcGNCCmWDC4iJZecYYeFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/I_5LX-Lpj5exulBEueZ9yQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbDW6P0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmWDC4iJZecYYeFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eCMf7BWCSYKi9dtfKSzxEw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbDW6P0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplgwuIiWXnGGHhUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
Fellow American, Merry Christmas!

Today, I’m blessed to be celebrating in sunny Florida with my daughters and
the rest of my family.

It’s a beautiful day to remember how blessed we are to live in the greatest
nation on Earth.

We’ve achieved so much this year, and I can’t wait to see what 2024 holds.

Enjoy your day, and MERRY CHRISTMAS!

Thank you,

Maria Elvira Salazar

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: A Message of Hope
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Together you and I can build a stronger, more prosperous and freer America.

|
---
| | | **Together you and I can build a stronger, more prosperous and freer America.
**
---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_message_resend_2nd&n=1)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_message_resend_2nd&n=2)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_message_resend_2nd&n=3)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
No matter what your faith tradition is, or is not, Christmas is a time to stop and consider the universal longings we all share together: hope, joy, peace, and goodwill to all.
Binding us all together is love, because love unites and it recognizes we are endowed by our Creator with dignity and honor.
These values I learned from my grandmother Rose. Many of you learned similar values from family and friends–many of whom lived though extremely tough times.
**My grandmother’s testimony is still valid today, and I hope you are inspired to imagine an America that values all, includes all, and welcomes all.**
Together you and I can build a stronger, more prosperous and freer America.
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
---

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=5557a4f4b0204ee185f519e0ecda198f&_e=uLLnr9lIipb7WCLfwuZyfjYA9cZEOMt8-vZP632KT7hhf7vQ1ck_mtXbnNa-xn-T9ZCnd5onaZ3s7Nu-ddOuoLZtrvrenaXXA62h_Enq0EaVowySIW3AVgSMZgSPO-3EhBHov1URdT0v9GUOLj-NzzUIfuNrcmsFpni5lPQtG2XYezUP_zSo8eATjk5XV8TLCSN5OazSldVL_xSfKai4_-mRWXzCeJNZdbc2rexG4IYSOxjLPLByu9KhcS2LAVZ6o43IpBtg-k1rJ1pUdHBgG86nGnrvFTTtAWhGP_fpY_SnML1cDkB8VsMWmdnTo-ptoXCsB3Bg409Jzl3hW84VvQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,
---
As a Green Beret, I spent many Christmases abroad away from my family. Now that I’ve retired, I’m so grateful for every holiday I get to spend here with my wife and my daughters in North Carolina. If you’re lucky enough to spend Christmas with your loved ones this year, you are extremely blessed. I hope today is filled with love, laughter, and joy at the birth of our savior and the holiday season. Merry Christmas, and I look forward to all we can achieve together in the New Year.
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=5557a4f4b0204ee185f519e0ecda198f&_e=uLLnr9lIipb7WCLfwuZyfjYA9cZEOMt8-vZP632KT7hhf7vQ1ck_mtXbnNa-xn-T9ZCnd5onaZ3s7Nu-ddOuoLZtrvrenaXXA62h_Enq0EaVowySIW3AVgSMZgSPO-3EhBHov1URdT0v9GUOLj-NzzUIfuNrcmsFpni5lPQtG2XYezUP_zSo8eATjk5XV8TLBqckr7gcztlxwhbxlGBSkFexperGhSw5k4a5AG8GKhFmjCmNnObuzNy8fOSSe51T91MI-txb-n8-eDnkv1Ef1onSSzLf8R342asgii7rJWpMCWPULdlF5qnVfMLLmI3XP4h0iHjJV7hdimb5IvDlcw%3D%3D)

name: Matt Cartwright
subject: From my family to yours…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cartwright for Congress
body:
Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays, Peter.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75780199/445728367/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjU1YjI0NS0zNmEzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cMo2EH1jdOtmwQRtN3YkuQsj-mcn_WcFAWxwrXUUYgE=&emci=2f966a48-e599-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=c255b245-36a3-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

As we gather with our loved ones to celebrate this joyous holiday season, I wanted to take a moment to extend my warmest wishes to you and your family. Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!

This time of year is about more than just exchanging gifts or indulging in delicious meals. It's about the spirit of giving, kindness, and the joy of being surrounded by those we cherish the most. Whether you're celebrating Christmas, Hanukkah, Kwanzaa, or any other festive tradition, may this season bring you peace, comfort, and cherished moments with your loved ones.

Let's take a moment to reflect on the blessings we've shared, the challenges we've overcome, and the hope for a brighter future ahead. Your support and goodwill have been a true gift to me and my team, and I'm immensely grateful for your continued encouragement.

May the holiday season fill your home with laughter, your heart with love, and your spirit with the joy of the season. Here's to a wonderful Christmas and a New Year filled with happiness, prosperity, and countless reasons to smile.

Warmest wishes,

– Matt
---

body:

| "The light of the Christmas star to you, the warmth of a home and hearth to you, the cheer and good will of friends to you, the hope of a childlike heart to you, the joy of a thousand angels to you, and the love of the Son and God's peace to you."

Dear Friends, As our momentum grows and our message of hope in restoring the American Dream is spread across our region, I take this time to give praise and thanks for all the good you do...

name: Joe Biden
subject: Happy holidays from the Biden family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
| | |
---
The Christmas story is at the heart of the Christian faith, but the values of hope, love, peace, and joy are universal. They speak to all of us as human beings who are here on this Earth to care for one another, to look out for one another, to love one another. These values are always important, and we see them in action in communities throughout our country. **All across America, we see stories of revival and renewal, hope and optimism. And pride. Pride in your work, in your family, in your town. Pride in this nation.** My hope this Christmas season is that we take a few moments of quiet reflection. To really look at each other, not as Democrats or Republicans, but as who we really are: Fellow Americans. Fellow human beings worthy of being treated with dignity and respect. We’re truly blessed to live in this nation. And I truly hope we take the time to look out for one another. That’s why I wanted to send you this note, Peter. **So that you know, we’re thinking of each and every member of this team this holiday.** Jill and I wish you and your family peace, joy, health, and happiness this season. From the Biden family to yours, Merry Christmas and happy holidays! Joe Joe Biden
President of the United States

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you so much for being a supporter of President Biden and Vice President Harris. But Peter, we don’t want to bother you. If you’d like to only receive our most important emails, **[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk6gVFZ1bAZYY22mWHMkylxoqbbKg-qcOwUUXejXedxt53CcJf9RMqcNN6XUZRvHbRnS20jgczhoVM6jBaXEqB3JpY7YJUOkQp11wHkm977ZGLOvkyv0e-hAkWCBW5ETHyEyYKCehkg2gpMfAUyd4RXrnFHnNa2BHRobAubxFu23ilr5Ry6_ia4c2ImNG3m2v_meaiL4X27XupQAMNA-nEYlSWTlgI9rdhr7rEqrC4tFkhfj3SgzusS6dux5BYE1jvjr1y2AmIn32TXXf4vDWLm/42f/-9v1U3X5TOyqhSmx2Oto5Q/h0/nE1urOYQTh1z9T1DfrmbEyfiFmyn1mh9SfbtVny3rkA)** If you’d like to unsubscribe from all Biden for President emails, you can **[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWalZZNA-6Dgih5xl3OksSXp4BzvSO-6fBGB1UOocvyFWu1NSD6F0Wjn07AQD_IZiSBn7Kp5dL3Evk2EBSSCRtNzdiPU08BYBWffFOvWuQa9ex3BhuaMDWwkSKKPiN9i7GckFjdDXRPya9XCWJROpQXO0lpRZn_cH3evXLiUeR9ZNSo5CeaRhjcjM4uPQ_H5qVhEiDB8aII3yMCo_yYChA2PPGKOTVnaN0aDLt_v6cMaDxIZxkDJ3MhcdOf6ZocIPn7aX1VvXcPuo2a7nwX0Yl/42f/-9v1U3X5TOyqhSmx2Oto5Q/h1/84NN8VqXwWfOFAKui5Gfo-tSbmdc4-OtlNCNbm8BZac)**

clean_body: | | | The Christmas story is at the heart of the Christian faith, but the values of hope, love, peace, and joy are universal. They speak to all of us as human beings who are here on this Earth to care for one another, to look out for one another, to love one another. These values are always important, and we see them in action in communities throughout our country. All across America, we see stories of revival and renewal, hope and optimism. And pride. Pride in your work, in your family, in your town. Pride in this nation. My hope this Christmas season is that we take a few moments of quiet reflection. To really look at each other, not as Democrats or Republicans, but as who we really are: Fellow Americans. Fellow human beings worthy of being treated with dignity and respect. We’re truly blessed to live in this nation. And I truly hope we take the time to look out for one another. That’s why I wanted to send you this note, Peter. So that you know, we’re thinking of each and every member of this team this holiday. Jill and I wish you and your family peace, joy, health, and happiness this season. From the Biden family to yours, Merry Christmas and happy holidays! Joe Joe Biden President of the United States

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Ghost of Christmas rants
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER
body:
Your uncle might not want to hear why Trump is a threat to our democracy, but we do. Respond to this email and vent.
|
---
Friend,

It’s finally the holidays—my favorite time of the year. I love nothing more than seeing family, eating way too much food, and cozying up with a nice cocktail. But there is always that side of the holidays no one looks forward to. Those uncomfortable, unavoidable conversations with the loved ones we disagree with. Everyone has that one conspiracy theorist in the family who makes the inevitable politics conversation the downturn of the night. **So we want to give you an outlet to rant because we know exactly how it feels.** [Respond to this email and vent. ](mailto:hello@ruleoflawrepublicans.com) Your uncle might not want to hear why Trump is a threat to our democracy, or why lies about the 2020 election erode our institutions and the rule of law, but we do. [Just reply to this email and let us know your thoughts.](mailto:hello@ruleoflawrepublicans.com) I look forward to hearing from you. In the meantime, thanks for being here, and happy holidays! Sarah Longwell
Executive Director, Republican Accountability Project
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Charlotte=20Bergmann.?=
subject: Merry Christmas
body:
Happy New Year 2024 | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9ef1ee7050dc/merrychristmas-5431594?e=9dd54a4530)
---
|
---
May your celebrations be marvelously Merry and beautifully Bright, Peter! - Merry Christmas and Happy New Year 2024 from Charlotte Bergmann!
|
---
|
---
I am a walking miracle. I give all praise and honor to God!

My car was struck and sent into a hydroplane on the expressway, only to land in the opposite direction, all while another truck was bearing down on me. I was only able to say one word, "Jesus." The car was picked up in the air, again, and landed besides the median barrier, without touching it. I walked away without a scratch on my body. Even after my car was sent flying in the air. my car had only a small dent where the 18-wheeler's bumper hit my bumper in the back.

I have been homeless, and no physical harm ever occurred to me. After attending a day of prayer meeting on May. 2021, I was T-boned, which totaled my precious car. I walked out without a scratch to my body, and the Lord blessed me with another car, with no car note. That's not all He's done, y'all!

Though He slay me, yet will I TRUST HIM. HE IS WORTHY! Peter In the interim, please be patient with me. God is not through with me.

[](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=205f9caf11&e=9dd54a4530)

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Flippo=20and=20Family?=
subject: A Christmas Day Message from the Flippo Family
body:
Wishing You a Blessed Christmas | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dfbaeb3f1bb7/a-christmas-day-message-from-the-flippo-family?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | Peter

On this special day, as we celebrate the birth of Jesus Christ, my family and I extend our warmest Christmas greetings to you and your loved ones. Today, more than ever, we are reminded of the enduring message of love, hope, and salvation that Christmas brings to each of our lives.

In a world that often seems to shy away from the true essence of Christmas, we proudly affirm our faith and the joyous celebration of Christ's birth. "Merry Christmas" is not just a greeting; it's a declaration of our belief in the miraculous, the holy, and the divine.

We understand that the push towards a more secular holiday season is strong, but we stand firm in our traditions and beliefs. Christmas is a time to reflect on the blessings we've received, to gather with family and friends, and to share the story of Christ's birth with joy and reverence.
---
| |
As you gather today, whether around a Christmas tree, at a church service, or simply enjoying the company of loved ones, we encourage you to embrace the true spirit of Christmas. Let's make this day about more than just gifts and feasting; let's make it about cherishing the gift of Jesus Christ to the world.

We are incredibly grateful for the support and fellowship you've shown throughout the year. Your commitment to upholding our shared values and traditions is a beacon of hope in these challenging times. As we look forward to the new year, let's carry the spirit of Christmas with us, spreading love, peace, and goodwill to all we meet.

>From our family to yours, Merry Christmas. May this day be filled with the peace and joy of Christ, and may the new year bring you continued blessings and happiness.
---
|
---
| Merry Christmas,

David Flippo & Family

P.S. As we celebrate this day of giving and receiving, let's also give thanks for the blessings in our lives and look for ways to be a blessing to others. Your continued support and friendship mean the world to us.
---

clean_body: Wishing You a Blessed Christmas | | | | | Peter On this special day, as we celebrate the birth of Jesus Christ, my family and I extend our warmest Christmas greetings to you and your loved ones. Today, more than ever, we are reminded of the enduring message of love, hope, and salvation that Christmas brings to each of our lives. In a world that often seems to shy away from the true essence of Christmas, we proudly affirm our faith and the joyous celebration of Christ's birth. "Merry Christmas" is not just a greeting; it's a declaration of our belief in the miraculous, the holy, and the divine. We understand that the push towards a more secular holiday season is strong, but we stand firm in our traditions and beliefs. Christmas is a time to reflect on the blessings we've received, to gather with family and friends, and to share the story of Christ's birth with joy and reverence. | | As you gather today, whether around a Christmas tree, at a church service, or simply enjoying the company of loved ones, we encourage you to embrace the true spirit of Christmas. Let's make this day about more than just gifts and feasting; let's make it about cherishing the gift of Jesus Christ to the world. We are incredibly grateful for the support and fellowship you've shown throughout the year. Your commitment to upholding our shared values and traditions is a beacon of hope in these challenging times. As we look forward to the new year, let's carry the spirit of Christmas with us, spreading love, peace, and goodwill to all we meet. From our family to yours, Merry Christmas. May this day be filled with the peace and joy of Christ, and may the new year bring you continued blessings and happiness. | | Merry Christmas, David Flippo & Family P.S. As we celebrate this day of giving and receiving, let's also give thanks for the blessings in our lives and look for ways to be a blessing to others. Your continued support and friendship mean the world to us. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Committee To Elect David Flippo, All rights reserved.

Fellow Patriot,
'Tis the season to share joy with our loved ones, and now is the time to reflect and celebrate our values that make our community and our great state of Florida so special.
May your Christmas be filled with joy, laughter, and the warmth of family and friends.

---

---
Thank you,

---
Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-03

Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | Have a wonderful Christmas | Fellow Patriot, 'Tis the season to share joy with our loved ones, and now is the time to reflect and celebrate our values that make our community and our great state of Florida so special. May your Christmas be filled with joy, laughter, and the warmth of family and friends. Thank you, | | Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-03 | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 = \- ==

name: Sean Feucht
subject: 🎄MERRY CHRISTMAS🎄
body:
| | |
---
Dear Friend,
---
Merry Christmas from me, my family and the whole Let Us Worship team. God has blessed us greatly in 2023, and worked powerfully among His people. Although we live in dark times marked by sin and confusion, we serve a risen Lord.
---
---
Jesus _IS _the reason for the season, and we need not despair, only reflect and respond! _For unto us a child is born, unto us a son is given: and the government shall be upon his shoulder: and his name shall be called Wonderful, Counsellor, The mighty God, The everlasting Father, The Prince of Peace -__Isaiah 9:6_.
---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Suzanne=20Crouch?=
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
Merry Christmas! As the warmth of the holiday season envelops us, I am filled with gratitude and a sense of hope for the future.

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

Merry Christmas! As the warmth of the holiday season envelops us, I am filled with gratitude and hope for the future.

In this joyous time, I extend my heartfelt wishes to each of you, praying that the spirit of Christmas fills your homes with love, peace, and joy.
Christmas is a season of giving, a time when we reflect on the greatest gift of all—the birth of our Savior, Jesus Christ. His teachings of love, compassion, and kindness serve as a guiding light.

As we celebrate with family and friends, let us remember the true meaning of Christmas and strive to embody those values in our daily lives.

I️ also want to take a moment to express my sincere appreciation for the incredible support I've received from Hoosiers like you. Your belief in our shared vision for Indiana's future is the greatest gift of all.

Together, we can face the challenges ahead with courage and commitment, knowing that the values we hold dear will guide us toward a brighter future.

Wishing you and your family a blessed and Merry Christmas!

Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Julie=20Clark?=
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
From my family to yours. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/699d47a1c1d2/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12670236?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=a69cbe4ba9&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Dear Peter,

As the holiday season descends upon us, I wanted to take a moment to extend my warmest wishes to you and your loved ones. _**Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year! **_
---
|
---
|
This time of year holds a special place in our hearts, marked by moments of joy, reflection, and the spirit of giving. _**It's a time to come together with family and friends, to share laughter, and create memories that will last a lifetime.**_

As we celebrate the season, let us also reflect on the values that bind us as a community. The holidays remind us of the importance of compassion, kindness, and generosity. _**These qualities are the foundation of a strong and supportive community,**_ and I am grateful to be a part of the incredible community we share.

Looking ahead to the coming year, I am excited about the opportunities to work together for the betterment of our district. Your support and engagement have been instrumental.

May your Christmas be filled with love, laughter, and the warmth of those you hold dear. May the New Year bring you renewed hope, prosperity, and success.

_**Thank you for being an essential part of this journey**_. Wishing you and your loved ones a Merry Christmas and a Happy Holiday Season!
---
|
---
|
Merry Christmas America,

Julie Clark
Former Medina County Republican Chair
Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23
[ClarkForCongress.com](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=da55fecdbe&e=c982eb7ad4)

body:
We have a lot to update you on. | | | |
---

On behalf of the Michigan Republican Party, we wish you a beautiful, safe, and inspiring Christmas. Wherever you may be, may you be blessed and at peace.

But before you go, we thought you might enjoy these videos:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75793059/445758636/-849459103?refcode=ea.e9460bbc-47a3-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ms=ea.e9460bbc-47a3-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTQ2MGJiYy00N2EzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jmdGWedjc0PxtTTy2-MygwmD1u6JWfJDhCMJTM0oP80=&emci=23b65c85-4ba0-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=e9460bbc-47a3-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=46764483) This is always one of my favorite times of the year. It’s a time to reflect on all we have to be grateful for and all we can wish for in the year ahead. I’m appreciating a few much-needed days off the campaign trail, but I wanted to send my very best wishes to you and your loved ones. I hope the holiday season finds you surrounded by hope and joy, and that 2024 brings you nothing but health and happiness. Yours, Gloria Johnson

**_We know this card will go VIRAL!_ So if you want to reserve your spot, we need you to sign in the next HOUR!** **[⇩ADD YOUR NAME TO SIGN THE BIDEN HOLIDAY CARD NOW⇩](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20231225_EMCARD_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=12201%2E878179%2EkCsOkL)** | [**ADD MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20231225_EMCARD_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=12201%2E878179%2EkCsOkL)

**_IN 2020:_** Donald Trump LOST – the popular vote AND the Electoral College – and set his sights on overturning the election results.

name: Nancy & Kit Dahlstrom
subject: From our family to yours
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | This Christmas, there is so much to be thankful for, Peter. We are thankful for our family, our health, and the chance to serve the best people in the great state of Alaska in the most amazing country on earth. As we celebrate and reflect on our blessings this holiday, we are also thankful for your unwavering support as we embark on the next chapter of our public service. So, as you gather with your own loved ones, we wish you warmth and good tidings this Christmas holiday. From our family to yours, Merry Christmas! Nancy and Kit Dahlstrom
---
|

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | This Christmas, there is so much to be thankful for, Peter. We are thankful for our family, our health, and the chance to serve the best people in the great state of Alaska in the most amazing country on earth. As we celebrate and reflect on our blessings this holiday, we are also thankful for your unwavering support as we embark on the next chapter of our public service. So, as you gather with your own loved ones, we wish you warmth and good tidings this Christmas holiday. From our family to yours, Merry Christmas! Nancy and Kit Dahlstrom | | | | | | | | | | | | | No longer want to receive these emails? .

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=c2adbb7fc4fb455ca1e46701e6c30b93&_e=P2PiU5xpI_Yt4fDlO786Qe6bVULCnopSixSlVQU7DWzGN2ck-dIt2TdeNlSzQgvP-yv9GorpB4GAiYmKueBxXk0aJkW4K-05jBiixMRBlybPZfsntBGss9RmU74IXA5iR5NojlWuqTvvsTcpXPc25fL_6VLlX7AHMbaf7hoghPBTl2qyQQK9FCsha0sDA4HcZXm_vb9SDWl3zI8-nTDRHQ%3D%3D)
---
As we enjoy a wondrous time of year, I want to wish you a very Merry Christmas!

I hope this festive season finds you surrounded by joy, warmth, and the love of family and friends. During this season of reflection, let us embrace the holiday spirit and remember what Christmas is truly about.
---
For God so loved the world,
that he gave his only begotten Son,
that whosoever believeth in him should not perish,
but have everlasting life.
**– John 3:16**
---
I wish you and your family a very Merry Christmas!

Warm regards,
**Glenn Grothman**
---

name: Carmen Goers
subject: Happy Holidays from the Carmen Goers Campaign
body:
Celebrating Fantastic Supporters Like You

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **Happy Holida****ys to You and Yours
**
---

Dear Peter,
As the lights twinkle and snow glistens, we take a moment from the campaign trail to celebrate the heart of our community: YOU.
From door knocks to phone calls, you've shared your stories, fueled our fire, and reminded us why we fight. Your trust isn't just a vote, it's a partnership for a brighter Washington.
This holiday season, we raise a toast to your unwavering spirit, your relentless hope, and the shared future we'll build together. May your days be merry, your hearts warm, and your homes filled with laughter.
---
| | | |
---
| | | Happy Holidays, and onward to victory!

Sincerely,

Carmen Goers

---
|
---

Team, **the holiday season is here, and we have so much to be grateful for!**

Since the Bidens walked into the White House, they have restored dignity to the office and fought for the American people by strengthening our economy, combating climate change, lowering prescription drug costs -- and so much more!

To thank the President and First Lady for all they've done, we're collecting signatures from 15,000 Democrats on our holiday card for them. But we can't send it until we hit our goal, and **as of 12/25/2023 we don’t have your signature on file! So please, before midnight:**

[**Sign the card to wish the Bidens Happy Holidays!**](https://go.dscc.org/go/16578?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231225-ResponseMissing-BidenHolidayCard-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231225-ResponseMissing-BidenHolidayCard-Pros-sl1&akid=12968%2E9716520%2EyHe0nH)

Friend,
On behalf of the entire campaign and my family, I would like to wish you and your family a Merry and safe Christmas!
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=f39647e3e0&e=91a702298f)

**God Bless,**_Fmr. Mayor John J. Lee_

name: Friends of Charity Barry
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
| | | |
---
|
# MERRY CHRISTMAS!
---
---
| | |
---|---

Merry Christmas, Friends!

This Christmas, as you enjoy time together with friends and family, remember the reason we gather today...

Over 2,000 years ago a baby was born for the ultimate sacrifice - He came, He lived, He served, He died - all so that we could enjoy a life fulfilled by a loving relationship with the Father..

I pray that you feel the hope, joy, peace, and blessings of the true meaning of Christmas today!

| Sincerely,
Charity Barry
---
---

clean_body: | | | | | MERRY CHRISTMAS! | | | ---|--- Merry Christmas, Friends! This Christmas, as you enjoy time together with friends and family, remember the reason we gather today... Over 2,000 years ago a baby was born for the ultimate sacrifice - He came, He lived, He served, He died - all so that we could enjoy a life fulfilled by a loving relationship with the Father.. I pray that you feel the hope, joy, peace, and blessings of the true meaning of Christmas today! | Sincerely, Charity Barry | | == | | | == | == == == | | | | | | | Friends of Charity Barry | PO Box 267, Mineral Point, WI 53565 | | Sent by mailto:charity@charitybarryforcongress.com powered by

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Merry merry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
http://www.wileynickel.com/ [http://www.wileynickel.com/]
Dear Peter,
Happy holidays! I hope that wherever you’re spending this holiday season, you’re with the ones you love. This has been a hectic year, but this season always reminds me to slow down and take the time to appreciate all the things that matter most: family, friends, health, and happiness.
http://www.wileynickel.com/ [http://www.wileynickel.com/]
Thank you for your support this year. I’m wishing you and your family a joyous holiday season!
Be well,
Wiley

Chuck Grassley's Christmas Message: [](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=8307c612ce4a48c38deb63496404f289&_e=EQ-uwL6cEUFc_MGhlmPI1L_fIoWQxIrSQpxzTOth9kiRtesRBVUuw1LuIv3WV9y3uuad8X5dMLCHRBG9PuDTcEFXYS9wsU7gOC82wU6C2YpnP3bR5YZ7b0YnNtt4rs5ZTe-OdzqDq-IrxGsOAcgMVbI5QCAGMvM4BUWikkNbJwoh6Fz1g1NoQDDGwmPTMOxSQNY1ORLSi8BkatWyYLz6LeIEI4I__g2EJj1P1csCOAI%3D) Barbara and I wish you and your loved ones a very Merry Christmas. May this most wonderful time of the year bring tidings of joy, health, and happiness to your household. Enjoy the treasured traditions around your family table and in front of the Christmas tree. We are grateful to celebrate another Christmas together and blessed by your continued prayers and support.
May the birth of our Lord and Savior bring Light and happiness to you and yours.

God bless,
Barbara & Chuck Grassley

Friend - I wanted to reach out this morning to say merry Christmas and happy holidays!
As we prepare for a full year ahead of presidential campaigning, politics, and elections I hope you can relax and enjoy time with your family and friends.
Thank you again for all that you have done for me and our shared goal of getting rid of Jim Jordan and saving America. I cannot wait to win this election and represent all of us in Congress next year!
Wishing you all the best this holiday season!
Happy Holidays,
\- Tamie

| Peter**,

>From my family to yours, I hope you have a Merry Christmas!**

Here’s to enjoying time spent with loved ones, many blessings, and festive cheer as we look forward to brighter days ahead for California and America.
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=615f037ab4&e=8a657725d1)

| Let’s celebrate the birth of our Lord and take time to remember all the things we have to be thankful for this holiday season.

Merry Christmas,
_Scott Baugh_

subject: 1776 Forever Free - MERRY CHRISTMAS! HUGE SUCCESS!
body:
Big wins at the ReAwaken America Tour and Turning Point USA!

https://1776foreverfree.com?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID
1776 Newsletter - December 2022

** Elections Are Over, Covid Scam Mandates Have Subsided, So Where Do We Go From Here?
------------------------------------------------------------
Do you find yourself lost and wondering how to get involved and make an impact on a local, State and National level? There are currently no campaigns that need your participation, no mandates to mask up, vax up and rob you of your parental and medical freedoms to fight against. Corrupt Government and Big Pharma would love for you to believe that there is nothing to fight for right now. Everything has gone back to "normal", and you are supposed to forget the past two years where you lost income and unconstitutional mandates kept you shackled. Now is the time to unite and educate yourself! 1776 Forever Free is bound and determined to educate everyone who is willing to listen. Open your eyes to the agenda of the far left, prepare yourself for the fight on the horizon. We buried our heads in the sand long enough, believing that the government had our best interests in mind. We see now that our passivism only led to loss of our freedoms and our God Given Rights.

** The far left and main stream media want to sexualize our children, emasculate our men, change our history books and remove all resemblance of morality.
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.dropbox.com/s/8whglps0fm94psr/cordie%20and%20alex.mov?dl=0&mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID

Watch our very own Dr. Cordie Williams as he exposes the corruption in our local schools. Sebastian Gorka is a fighting patriot willing to stick his neck out for our children. Get in the fight with us! Go to your local school boards and demand the removal of all sexually explicit and immoral books in your children's curriculum and libraries.

If not YOU, WHO? If not NOW, WHEN? YOU were made for such a time as this!!

God Bless You and Semper Fi,
Dr. Cordie Williams
USMC Veteran
Founder of 1776 Forever Free

https://www.dropbox.com/s/kruqrgyv1tely3l/IMG_0656.MOV?dl=0&mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID

New Videos On How To Run A Successful Campaign by Dr. Cordie Williams (Former US Senate Candidate for California):

The left have been organized and heavily funded when it comes to campaigning for their candidates. They are united in their efforts. It is high time we catch up and become the political party that takes back our State and our Nation. How can this be accomplished? Well for starters we need to kick Campaign Management companies to the curb, many are extorters and liars. Save your time and money and gain a new perspective on how to get in the mud, get dirty and fight like a marine.

** Free Shipping on $50+ Merch Orders!
------------------------------------------------------------

Check out our 1776 Forever Free trucker hat that features a Permacurv® visor and our Organic cotton tote - two staples that can be used year round!
https://www.shop1776foreverfree.com/product-page/1776-forever-free-trucker-cap?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID

https://www.shop1776foreverfree.com/product-page/1776-large-organic-tote-bag?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID

SHOP 1776 MERCH (https://www.shop1776foreverfree.com/?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID)

** California Corrupts The Minds Of Our Youth As We Stand Idly By!
------------------------------------------------------------

Dr. Cordie Williams and Shawn Ferosh unpack the evil that is consuming our children's minds and blocking Christian values in our society today.
https://rumble.com/v20jnwi-satanic-public-education-corrupting-the-minds-of-american-youth-american-fi.html?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID

**
Justice For COVID Tyranny
------------------------------------------------------------
After Tuesday November 7th's special runoff election ended with Democratic incumbent Raphael Warnock maintaining a 1+ Dem seat majority in the senate, post-midterms, the U.S. government, lawmakers at Capitol Hill, and mainstream media pundits trudge along with "business as usual".

Late Tuesday night, December 6th, bipartisan leadership in both houses agreed on a $858 billion military policy bill that would terminate the Pentagon’s mandate that troops receive the COVID-19 vaccine, much to the dismay of the Biden Administration.

In the inevitable rollback process, will it be business as usual? Or will the millions of impacted lives, the billions of dollars of lost income, the permanent damage to personal health, the unnecessary death of loved ones, be accounted for?
https://rumble.com/v20jlxu-justice-for-covid-tyranny-unalienable-right-dr.-cordie-williams-and-shawn-f.html?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID
Watch Here >> (https://rumble.com/v1nem86-california-declares-war-on-the-medical-profession.-cordie-williams-with-seb.html?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID)
https://1776foreverfree.com/volunteer-application/?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID

We need passionate people who are looking to make a difference.
1. Do you have an extra hour or two a week available?
2. Are you organized, or willing to learn?
3. Are you ready to use your God-given skills to help 1776?

We would love to have you on our volunteer team!

Volunteer Application (https://1776foreverfree.com/volunteer-application/?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID)
We need to start a conversation where the other side is not "Made wrong," but where a conversation starts that bridges the gap between what they think they know from fake news to what the constitution really says.

**
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Idea?! A Constitution Video Series
------------------------------------------------------------
These powerful videos would include an interview with Doug Gibbs about pertinent matters of the day, and at the end of each video you would have take-home nuggets where you could start discipling to other people about the constitution.

** We are trying to raise $10,000 to do a 3 part video series involving training candidates.
------------------------------------------------------------
As a non-profit, we are incredibly grateful for all of the donations that have come in. YOU make what we do possible. This video series has been on our hearts for some time now, and we believe we can make this happen with your help!

Donate Here >> (https://1776foreverfree.com/donate/?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Coalition
Several others and I, after God gave me the vision and direction have formed a Coalition to accomplish (2) objectives:
1. To take down the RINO's, DM me on IG or email me at cordie@cordie4senate.com (mailto:cordie@cordie4senate.com) , to get more on that objective. (We have to be somewhat hush-hush as the forces of evil are never ending in their pursuit to ruin me, and this Republic.
2. Support Candidates with Money, Fundraising people to hold events, provide a social media following for them, Church connections so they have a stage to reach the masses. We feel that candidates that have leverage are candidates that win. Grassroots organizations like the California Tea Party Caucus and the CRA, "The California Republican Assembly," should be stepping up to lead California. Well, they are, but they need you and I. Get involved and become a CRA member and inquire about how you can help 1776 with the Coalition.

CRA Membership Info (https://cragop.org/join-cra/?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID)

** OUR SPONSORS
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.mypillow.com?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID
https://athleticism.com?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID

https://uncletonysitaliancuisine.com?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID

https://healthfromwithinca.com?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID

http://www.discoverbeautyfromwithin.com?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID

1776 Forever Free is a 501c3 and does not endorse any candidate!
Any interviews conducted is solely educational.

============================================================

Follow our social media to stay informed of the latest videos, news & events!

** JOIN Dr Cordie Lee Williams 1776 Freedom Fighters Telegram Group (http://t.me/DrCordie?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** Dr. Cordie's Website (https://drcordiewilliams.com/?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** 1776 Forever Free Website (https://1776foreverfree.com?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** Follow Dr. Cordie on Twitter (https://twitter.com/drcordiew?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** Dr. Cordie's Instagram (http://instagram.com/drcordiewilliams?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** @1776foreverfree (https://www.instagram.com/1776foreverfree/?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** YouTube (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCB9oE15xobnPR06qbF2x89A?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** 1776 Forever Free Facebook Page (https://www.facebook.com/1776ForeverFree?mc_cid=d554e27425&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** General Contact Email (mailto:info@1776foreverfree.com)
* 1776 Forever Free is a nonprofit community organization supporting all Americans’ Constitutional Rights *

MISSION:
1776 Forever Free is a 501(c)3 which focuses on actively educating Americans of their Constitutional Rights, regardless of political party, gender, race, religion, or creed. This is a movement to empower our fellow Patriots to recognize societal issues, inspire others, and most importantly, take action. We need you Patriots, here and abroad, to bring Freedom back to our world for future generations.
EIN #85-4110665 State of California

Copyright © 2023 Dr. Cordie Williams 4 Senate, All rights reserved.
You are receiving this email because you signed up or donated to Dr. Cordie Williams 4 Senate.

Our mailing address is:
Dr. Cordie Williams 4 Senate
1818 Marron Rd Ste 103
103
Carlsbad, CA 92008-1188
USA
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://cordie4senate.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=e5d6d5e535e64d56a3dbe6a1d&id=c3437b51a0&e=3c92f5cc01&c=d554e27425)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://cordie4senate.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e5d6d5e535e64d56a3dbe6a1d&id=c3437b51a0&e=3c92f5cc01&c=d554e27425)

__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=be3676f5d8f9403a954cbcec366e75d2&_e=zaqZdkfpyp8fg3aFidhZTjjdEIkq4k7yHlzTBva3gDFUVcwD1bew-dyNPpvRaFqYQP8vDuk3EnMDtMDEhYS_l8Rr1UT776DLf1RNE6zWlqwHKDb7Q8cIrtSnI4M8tKE1gV2XUOOlNDmn2UpAeFX209fjJM52HoA1IyEjJknO4ebd4U82WsQUcihTMV6lgc9xJJ5_7BmH6VfCZ2kbox0AoQ%3D%3D) Friends, To all who are celebrating today, I just wanted to take a moment today to wish you and your loved ones a merry Christmas and a happy holiday season! As 2023 comes to an end, and we prepare to kick off a new year, I could not be more grateful to have had you by my side. I feel like a lucky man to be spending today with my family and hope that your holiday is filled with happiness and blessings. [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=be3676f5d8f9403a954cbcec366e75d2&_e=zaqZdkfpyp8fg3aFidhZTjjdEIkq4k7yHlzTBva3gDFUVcwD1bew-dyNPpvRaFqYkq1KJVBSe9P67pyQFzeNFQicVlD-R4m4N_f3urUEkLHjTxUTbuY31w8RnRKi6skalNR9rUXW5cXdLirrjBMyH9FkxdEhYfUvlJE5byuVcku-fd_RLDGTDSo__FjYbq7TLSF8ufV6d-WUVwhNASQvoA%3D%3D) Thank you, and happy holidays! name: =?utf-8?Q?Paul=20Hudson?=
subject: Marry Christmas and Happy Holidays from the Hudsons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Hudson for Congress]()
body:
Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays. I hope this season has been an opportunity for us all to reflect on how fortunate we are to be Americans. | | | | | [](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=47f2d9c797&e=26f66c7cbd)
---
Friend,
In a time when it’s easy to focus on the multitude of challenges facing our nation, such as inflation, a crisis at the border, and geopolitical uncertainty amidst foreign wars, I find myself reflecting on how fortunate we are to be citizens of this beautiful country.
Often one can only truly appreciate how incredible the inheritance of the American Founding is when its structures are shaken by rising polarization and the natural concerns arising in our country. Our founders gifted us a Republic, “If we can keep it,” built upon the bedrock of strong communities, civic institutions, and above all, family. I encourage you all to take some time to reflect in gratitude on the gift of family, friends, community, and our amazing nation that collectively we must “keep.”
Together we can restore unity to our country through acts of service and generosity, and this starts with each of us this holiday season. Join me in investing time in your community, take a moment to reflect on the year, and enjoy making memories with your loved ones. For these privileges, America was founded to protect and cultivate. Merry Christmas and Happy Holiday to you and your family from the Hudsons. Wishing you all a joyful and prosperous 2024!
God bless,**\- Paul Hudson**

Team: For centuries -- come snow, rain, heat, or the gloom of night -- postal workers have ensured that Americans receive the mail they need. **The hundreds of thousands of employees of the USPS _always_ get the job done.**

That's why this holiday season, we're putting together a _MASSIVE_ thank you card for USPS workers to show them how much the American people appreciate their hard work. **But we need to gather 200,000 signatures to send it, and our records show that you still haven't signed!**

**From:[ DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM](https://go.dscc.org/go/16727?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231225-SigntheCard-ThankPostalWorkers-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231225-SigntheCard-ThankPostalWorkers-Pros-sl1&akid=13001%2E9716520%2E0MhObT)**

---
---
Peter,
As we gather with our loved ones to celebrate Christmas, I wanted to take a moment to extend my warmest wishes to you and your family.
Christmas is a time for reflection, gratitude, and the joy of giving. It is also an opportunity for us to come together as a community, appreciating the bonds that make Oregon such a special place to call home. This year has brought its challenges, but it has also shown us the strength and resilience that define us as a people.
As your Congresswoman, I am continually inspired by the dedication and kindness that our community displays, especially during times of need. Our collective spirit of generosity and compassion shines brightly during the holiday season, reminding us of the power we hold to make a positive impact on the lives of others.
May this Christmas bring you moments of joy, laughter, and love. May it be a time of renewal and hope, as we look forward to the possibilities that the coming year holds.
Thank you for allowing me the honor of serving you as your Congresswoman. It is a privilege to work on behalf of our community, and I am grateful for the opportunity to contribute to the well-being of the people of Oregon.
Wishing you and your loved ones a Merry Christmas filled with love, laughter, and the warmth of shared moments.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, As we gather with our loved ones to celebrate Christmas, I wanted to take a moment to extend my warmest wishes to you and your family. Christmas is a time for reflection, gratitude, and the joy of giving. It is also an opportunity for us to come together as a community, appreciating the bonds that make Oregon such a special place to call home. This year has brought its challenges, but it has also shown us the strength and resilience that define us as a people. As your Congresswoman, I am continually inspired by the dedication and kindness that our community displays, especially during times of need. Our collective spirit of generosity and compassion shines brightly during the holiday season, reminding us of the power we hold to make a positive impact on the lives of others. May this Christmas bring you moments of joy, laughter, and love. May it be a time of renewal and hope, as we look forward to the possibilities that the coming year holds. Thank you for allowing me the honor of serving you as your Congresswoman. It is a privilege to work on behalf of our community, and I am grateful for the opportunity to contribute to the well-being of the people of Oregon. Wishing you and your loved ones a Merry Christmas filled with love, laughter, and the warmth of shared moments. Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- ==

**_BREAKING! BREAKING! BREAKING!_** [ ]() **DONALD TRUMP** just flew past Biden in the polls by 9 points according to a BREAKING new _ABC_ poll!
